title: Stop Kavanaugh NOW!
lyrics:
<strong>NOTE:<strong> We sing the melody of the original verses only (not the chorus).
There was a time in days of old [days of old]
When justice mattered, so we’re told [so we’re told]
(But now the) corporations own our Supreme Court
(So say good)bye to women’s freedom to abort.

We won’t be saved by Roe v Wade [Roe v Wade]
Not even if we’re force-a-bully laid [we’re afraid]
(A-nd) you can bet that our health care Safety Nets
Will be stolen from us if they’ve not been yet.

Environmental regs will go away [go away]
And the First Amendment will become passé [Oy vey!]
(And there will) be more guns to threaten our loved ones
Now the Court’s been purchased by the N-R-A.

We used to think that we could just appeal [just appeal]
To a court where we could get a good fair deal [an honest deal]
(But now we’re) fighting for our lives, and if we’re to survive,
(We‘ve got to) stop this nomination -- STOP IT NOW!
It’s a gross abomination -- STOP IT NOW!
For the future of our nation – STOP IT NOW!

title: Generic All Purpose Protest Song (Kavanaugh)
lyrics:
Here’s our gen<b>eric<b> all-purpose protest song,
And we can <b>sing<b> it whenever things go wrong.
It’s how we protest for peace and justice
We <b>sing<b> it loud and sing it strong.

We start by <b>naming<b> the current crises.
A Presi<b>dent<b> that tweets <b>insanities.
<b>When e’er Trump acts to… screw people over
We <b>trot<b> out this handy-dandy song.

Voter suppression,   picking racist fights
Trump sends Jeff Sessions to end our civil rights
When e’er Trump acts to… screw people over
We <b>sing<b> this good all-purpose song.

Inflaming <b>pre<b>judice, acting <b>above<b> the law,
and now Trump wants to …appoint Brett <b>Kav<b>anaugh
When e’er Trump acts to… screw people over
We <b>trot<b> out this handy-dandy song.

We’re Raging <b>Grannies<b>, so we’ll keep singing
And we’ll keep <b>raging,<b> our voices ringing.
As we get <b>older<b> we’re growing bolder,
We<b> sing<b> our generic protest song.

title: More Than Half the Sky
lyrics: Chorus: When you want things changed, call in your sisters Call in your mothers, Call in the grannies! There's no power on earth that can resist us, Because we hold u-p , half the sky. We never will forget, grandma was a suffragist. We’re fighting still for voting rights, and some don’t have them yet. But we won’t sit and sigh, burst into tears and cry. The world won’t change with-ou-out us, we hold up half the sky. Chorus We're singing out our praise, and thanks in these new days, For Rashida, Alexandria, Ilhan—they all amaze. Young women who'll defy, bad powers' evil eye. They're women out to change the world, helping hold up half the sky. Chorus Just look around you now, and you will see just how. We women here can change the world, 'cause we've got the know-how. So we don't sit and sigh, we raise our arms up high. To show the world that women's strength, holds up more than half the sky. Final Chorus When you want things changed, call in your sisters Call in your mothers, Call in the grannies! There's no power on earth that can resist us, Because we hold up more than half the sky.

doo-dah doo-dah

oh doo-dah day

to pipe and ship this gas around

doo-doo doo-doo

oh doo-doo day

refinery pollution
mile-long trains every other day
Methane and CO2

B) No escaped methane
if we use our brains

lyrics: CHORUS: Release the report and don’t sell us short; We have the right to know, you know. Our future is riding on what you are hiding, So show us the full report! Robert Mueller, a man in good standing, Set out to find out what was true; Now he might not have found real collusion, But just what else did Donald Trump do? REPEAT CHORUS This report was two years in the making And four pages is all that we got, Now the people demand full disclosure And we don’t think that’s asking a lot. REPEAT CHORUS Our president’s known for his lying, And we can’t trust a thing that he’s said. When he claims that he’s exonerated Then that must mean he’s guilty instead. REPEAT CHORUS

title: My Country 'tis of Thee 2019
lyrics:
Our founders claimed to be
True to democracy.
Sadly they lied.
They came from 'cross the sea
All shouting "liberty"
While committing hypocrisy
A-and genocide.

Our wealth was built on backs
Of Red and Brown and Black
Of them we sing.
Racism, fear and greed
Can never, ever feed
The democratic seed
That makes freedom ring!

Trump wants to build a wall
To keep one and all
Brown people out.
Our corp'rate politics
Is what created this
It's something no wall can fix.
We must kick Trump out!

We must do more than shout.
We must now bring about
Justice for all!
The barriers between
The races we've all seen.
It's time to wipe the future clean.
TEAR DOWN ALL THESE WALLS!!!
tune: My Country 'Tis of Thee/God Save the Queen

title: O Little Town of Bethlehem
lyrics:
O little town of BETHlehem
How still w-e see thee lie
Above thy deep and dreamless sleep
The si-le-ent stars go by
While Brooklynites packed UP to go
To live with lit-tle snow
Those there already raised their heads
And said don't take our beds.

Now towering walls ARE blocking
Their just and righteous fight
The hopes and fears of all the years
Are smol- der-ing tonight
No palaces has PALestine
Its water and fine wine
And olive trees are occupied
Her side of the gre-en line

For Palestine imPRI-is-oned
is locked behind strong walls
Amer-i-cans sleep, their taxes keep
Big guns on stolen land
Oh good folk come together
Proclaim that this must end
And limits set for all to get
Peace in this Holy Land.

title: Radical Environmentalists (The Original Version)
lyrics:
Oh, we’re radical environmentalists,
We’re radical environmentalists,
We like clean air and clean water,
Just like the farmer’s daughter.
We’re radical environmentalists!

Oh, we like our veggies without pesticides,
And our meat without those hormones placed inside
We like fish without PCBs,
And forests that still have some trees,
We’re radical environmentalists!

We like automobiles that do not pollute,
And we like guns that simply cannot shoot,
We like lawns grown without Weed N Feed,
We don’t like that gene-spliced seed,
We’re radical environmentalists!

So join these radical environmentalists,
Who want wind power and electric cars,
Recycle all your glass and paper,
And you can tell your maker,
You’re a radical environmentalist!
tune: She'll Be Coming Around the Mountain

lyrics: Chorus: Solidarity with Cuba! Solidarity with Cuba! Solidarity with Cuba! Cuba's example makes us strong Uncle Sam has stolen millions by enforcing a blockade But Cuban hearts and muscles have always given aid We can break the US power o'er the world if not afraid Cuba's example makes us strong. Chorus When the Cuban inspiration through the global blood shall run, There can be no power greater anywhere beneath the sun. When we all stand together we are greater than the one Cuba's example makes us strong.

(G#) Poli-ti-i-i-i- shuns who take corp'rate funds be-wa-a-are your ca-reers are now done! There's a pash'nate pro-gress-ive move-ment sweep-in' 'cross this land as those tired of be-ing robbed by the weal-thy take a stand! Your Tee-ee V ads can't fool us now! We've see-een through them and here's our vow: We'll kick out all you corp'rate pup-pets who've thrown us 'neath the bus! We'll vote on-ly for those who are a-ccount-a-ble to us. We-e-e are the new pro-gress-ives! We-e-e are no long-er pass-ive! We-e-e great-ly out-num-ber you! (very slow) Yo-o-or... reign... is... now... clear-ly... through! lyrics: I make a little wish here For olive trees, not pig So treif it ain't, I raise my plaint And hope the game's not rigged Chorus: O Bibi, Bibi, Bibi You need to go away And when you do, take the set'lements too Free Palestine today! title: Voting Ragin' Granny
lyrics:
I'm a Voting Ragin' Granny, and you parties better heed
You candidates should not just talk but need to do the deed
If you want to get elected, put aside the greed
I'm a Voting' Ragin' Granny, and you parties better heed

The first to do, is end all wars, whether you're Blue or Red
Just end the wars and bring 'em home that's all that needs be said
Then next be real on climate change and ditch all fossil fuels
'Cause without real change, we'll ALL be dead and we ain't no fools.

Now we don't vote for party hacks, whether they're Red or Blue
We only vote the issues so just listen and be true
Single payer health care is only a fair tool
And while you're at it, fix it up so our kids go free to school

I'm a Voting' Ragin' Granny, and you parties better heed
You candidates should not just talk but need to do the deed
If you want to get elected, put aside the greed
I'm a Voting' Ragin' Granny, and you parties better heed

title: Press Freedom
lyrics:
Would you like to keep our press free
To the truth we'd all have a key
Let reporters be all they can be
Or would you rather jail Assange?

Assange is a journalist with very long ears
He spits out everything he hears
He shared the truth of Hillary's sin
Now they want him jailed 'cause she didn't win

And by the way, if you'll go out on a limb
You might grow up to be like him.

Would you like to keep our press free
To the truth we'd all have a key
Let reporters be all they can be
Or would you lock up Chelsea?

Chelsea the soldier found wrongs she had to tell
Army telling doesn't go very well
So she carried them off to wik i leaks
Then served her time and did not speak

So if you don't want to lie and be a cur
You might grow up to be like her

Would you like to keep our press free
To the truth we'd all have a key
Let reporters be all they can be
Or would you rather try Ellsberg?

Daniel read secrets 'bout Vietnam
What was there gave him quite a qualm
He was tried for sharing the Pentagon's list
But all the charges against him were dismissed
If you think that's the way you should behave

You might grow up to be that brave
Not all heroes the hard line they toe
Some think the people simply oughta know
If you think truth should always overflow
You might just learn to whistle blow

title: Political Prisoners (My Country Isn't Free)
lyrics:
My country isn't free.
Where is democracy? We protest now.
Whistleblowers in U.S.A. Are punished for their say.
But they expose our moral decay
They remain unbowed.

Julian Assange was right. He brought emails to light,
He's been hunted since.
Finally he was caught; the UK can deport
Him to our country's evil court
Let freedom ring.

And Chelsea Manning's fate for helping circulate
U.S. Secret acts.
She was condemned to jail; she's back there without bail,
She's punished for her true details;
Let freedom ring.

Now Edward Snowden's next
He spread more secret texts. He's in exile.
My country isn't free; where is our Liberty?
We must now call to you and me
LE-ET FREEDOM RING.
tune: My Country 'Tis of Thee/ God Save the Queen

title: Caged Kids
lyrics:
Something happens to me.
When caged kids do I see
Begging endlessly
For a small bit of help from me.

How can such a rich place
As the U-nited States
Leave them in a cage
Without basic necessities?

Bridge:
M-y heart will never be the same
While my country does this to kids.

Change our minds, change our laws
Change the way we look at kids
With parents they should live.
And please soften our wooden hearts.

title: We Can Be Changable
lyrics: Gender is changeable! It’s not just binary Be your sexuality That’s our advisory. Gender is changeable! So is identity Sexuality must be free On this we all agree. Chorus: Gender rights must prevail For us all without fail We must all decide Who we are inside. Aa-aa-ah (gesture left) Aa-aa-ah (gesture right) No need to hide! Aa-aa-ah (gesture left) Aa-aa-ah (gesture right) N-o-o need to hide! Wherever we might be We’d like to guarantee That we will all be free Bullied by nobody. You have the right to be Your sexuality Love makes our hearts carefree It’s our reality Chorus

title: Gay Pride Saints
lyrics:
This could be done as a call and response with the first line sung by the granny on the mic and the rest joining in for the remainder of the verse. The second verse is optional depending on the laws in your state/province.

Today we celebrate Gay Pride.
Today we celebrate Gay Pride
How we love to be in [Your Town Here]
When thousands celebrate Gay Pride.

In [Your State Here] State, trans have full rights.
In [Your State Here] State trans have full rights.
How we love to live in this st-ate
Where trans folks finally have full rights.

Around this country, Gays can wed.
Around this country Gays can wed.
How we love to live in this country
Where we all can finally wed.

Today we all, can march and sing.
Today we all can march and sing
How we love it here in [Your Town Here]
When we let our voices ring!
tune: When the saints go marching in

title: Come to Me (Close the Camps)
lyrics:
At tender age, left in a cage,
Filled with terror and dread,
Restless sleep, mothers weep,
With no place to rest your head.

      Come to me, refugee,
      I lift my lamp high.
      By my light in the night
      You’ll be safe by and by.

 Flee you must! Those you trust
Trudged for days, months, and hours,
Moving on, through the dawn,
Seeking safety, child of ours.

      Come to me, refugee,
      May you know peace at last;
      By my light in the night
      May your terror be past.

Here we stand, with helping hands,
For our immigrant children,
Pledging now, a solemn vow,
That we’ll welcome you in.

      Come to me, refugee,
      As we all lift our lamps,
      By our light in the night
      We will close down those camps!

title: Immigration Granny Blues
lyrics:
It takes worried grannies, to sing a worried song.
It takes worried grannies, to sing a worried song.
It takes worried grannies, to sing a worried song.
We’re worried now, but we won’t be worried long.

Once we were all immigrants, how soon we forget.
Once we were all immigrants, how soon we forget.
Once we were all immigrants, how soon we forget.
We’re worried now, but we won’t be worried long.

Immigrants are going to feel, welcome in our land.
Children will be reunited, with their folks again.
The cages and the hatred, will be blown away.
We’re worried now, but we won’t be worried long.

2020’s coming soon, just not fast enough.
2020’s coming soon, just not fast enough.
2020’s coming soon, please get out & vote.
We’re worried now, but we won’t be worried long.

lyrics: They trudged many miles just to get here To the freedom of the U-S-A. The gates that they reached finally opened Their parents were then ripped away. CHORUS: Bring back, bring back Oh bring back their parents to them, to them Bring back, bring back Please bring back their parents to them. Guards put them in cages and fed them Poor food, dirty water, no more. With no arms to comfort their sobbing Then forced them to sleep on the floor. CHORUS The babies cannot stop their crying For Mama, for hugs, and for love. There’s no one to comfort and hold them Just prayers to the one up above. CHORUS I wish they could run in the sunshine And feel the warm wind on their face But thousands are crammed all together We must get them out of that place! Alternate final verse: Their bodies and minds are now damaged Our treatment of them's a disgrace With thousands of kids smashed together We must get them out of that place! CHORUS

title: Hiroshima Remembered
lyrics:
Hang down your head, U.S.A.,
Hang down your head in shame.
Thousands died in Hiroshima
And you’re the one to blame.

Hang down your head, U.S.A.,
You devastated with a BOOM!
This time in Nagasaki
You created another tomb.

Today we cage the children
Of countries we don’t like;
Tear them from their parents’ arms
Because their skin’s not white,

Our bombs and white supremacy:
All must disappear
So people living ‘round the world
Won’t have to live in fear.

The U. S. A. can lift its head
When they put an end to war.
Yes, everyone can live in peace
When we study war no more.
tune: Hang Down Your Head Tom Dooley

title: Never Again Hiroshima!
lyrics:
‘Twas long ago
And far across the sea,
So many died in an instant...
Hiroshima!

Children played
Out in the summer sun
Then burned in a living hell...
Hiroshima!

The mushroom cloud
And fireballs quickly spread,
Now only their shadows remain...
Hiroshima!

Light your lights
And never forget that day
When we dropped that bomb from the sky...
Hiroshima!

Now candles burn
All across our land
As we pledge that never again....
Hiroshima!
songwriter: Rose DeShaw revisions Connie Graves & Vicki Ryder

title: Affordable Housing
lyrics:
There are <u>too</u> many folks sleeping <u>out</u> in the street,

<u>Clutch</u>ing their bundles through the <u>cold</u> or the heat;

No <u>place</u> to call home and no <u>blan</u>kets or bed...

They’re lucky if some of them <u>even</u> get fed.



When <u>wages</u> are too low to <u>pay</u> the high rent,

And <u>folks</u> are left homeless -- not <u>even</u> a tent,

It’s <u>time</u> for a change, and on <u>that</u> we agree.

More af<u>ford</u>able housing is <u>what</u> we all need.



In this <u>pros</u>perous country, now <u>wouldn’t</u> you think

We could <u>house</u> all the homeless as <u>quick</u> as a wink?

If we <u>weren’t</u> spending billions on <u>weapons</u> of war,

We’d have af<u>ford</u>able housing for <u>all</u> of the poor.



In <u>Roch</u>ester city it’s <u>time</u> to get down

And to <u>feed</u> and to house all the <u>poor</u> in our town.

We must <u>fight</u> against poverty, <u>not</u> ’gainst the poor,

So that <u>no</u> one goes hungry or <u>home</u>less no more!

title: Wine Bottle Song
lyrics: CHORUS What shall we do with the old wine bottles? What shall we do with the old wine bottles? What shall we do with the old wine bottles, When we finish drinking? Let’s not fling them into streets then, They don’t make streets smell so sweet then, Our world will not look so neat then, With all that thoughtless flinging. CHORUS Trash just sends them into landfill, Landfill’s just a form of growth kill, Surely we have got the good will To give them a new beginning. CHORUS If they charge a very small toll They can start them on a new roll. The SAQ will start recycling, And we can keep on drinking.
tune: What shall we do with the Drunken Sailor
songwriter: Ellen Moore and Helen Van Veeren

title: Vote this Fall
lyrics: Are you thinking of not voting Think again, PLEASE think again (knock on head with knuckles) Chorus: Group A Group B Listen up then make a choice Go to vote and use your voice All Vote this fall, vote this fall. You might feel that voting is a lot of crap But look at where we’re at Chorus Voting is a right you can use To express your own views (point to audience) Chorus

title: DUMP DUMP
lyrics:
Dump, dump, dump your junk into every brook!
Who cares, why care? No one needs to look.

Throw, throw, throw your trash into every stream!
Who cares, why care? Who needs water clean?

Toss, toss, toss your litter into every river!
Who cares, why care? The fish can shake and shiver.

Fling, fling, fling your filth into every lake!
Who cares, why care? Not us, for goodness sake.

Drop, drop, drop your slop into every ocean!
Who cares, why care? The public has no notion.

Spill, spill, spill your waste into every sea!
Who cares, why care? Why waste our energy?

Clean, clean, clean our water! We demand a say!
WE CARE! YOU CARE! We drink it every day!

title: Trudeau's Pipeline
lyrics: Mr. Trudeau, Mr. Trudeau Now the bad news just got worse You have bought yourself a pipeline That is bound one day to burst Chorus: Dip your pen in dirty tar sands And just sign the earth away, Or cut the carbon, save the planet There is just no other way. There'll be protests on the coastline And in cities every week Cause that pipeline adds pollution And those pipelines always leak Chorus Mr. Trudeau, what has happened To the promises you made? You’ve forgotten, nature’s sacred, For our tax dollars, an awful trade Chorus
songwriter: adapted from the Ottawa Raging Grannies “Kinder Morgan” by Margaret Godbeer

title: Hey Hey, What’s Going On? (Anti-coal version)
lyrics: Hey! Hey! What’s going on? Things are going awfully wrong… Chorus We have got to get together. Hey! Hey! We can do better. Shame! Shame! when we don’t stand against the wrongs across our land…Repeat Chorus Here’s a cause that needs supporting There shouldn’t be any coal exporting...Repeat Chorus Our government is selling us out About this scam we need to shout…Repeat Chorus Dirty coal in the ground should stay Diggin it up’s too much to pay…Repeat Chorus Corporate greed is killing us all Most corporations need to fall...Repeat Chorus They’re sending coal across our land Spreading coal dust as fine as sand…Repeat Chorus Shipping coal to China makes us cuss Bad for them and bad for us...Repeat Chorus Using less energy is a start renewable sources the better part...Repeat Chorus Final Verse and Chorus Sing as a Round – sing 2 X (1st grp hold last note) Here’s a cause that needs supporting We don’t want any coal exporting...Repeat Chorus as part of the round

title: Now! Now! Now! (Anti-gun violence)
lyrics: We need to wake up! We need to rise up! We need to open our eyes And do it Now! Now! Now! We need to build a safer future And we need to start right now. We are a country that has a problem Too many guns, too many shootings We ask How? How? How? Can we build a safer future And we need to start right now. We are a-wa-re that thoughts and pray-ers While kindly meant don’t prevent Hearing Pow! Pow! Pow! We need new laws that do much more And we need to start right now. Let’s ban bump stocks and semi-autos Make background checks uni-ver-sal Do it Now! Now! Now! We need to build a safer future And we need to start right now. No more waiting or hesitating We must wise up, time to rise up Do it Now! Now! Now! We need to build a safer future And we need to start right now. We need to build a safer future And we’re going to start right now!

title: You're Fired!
lyrics: I open my morning newspaper To see what the President’s done, And the horrors just keep piling higher And I feel like I’m coming undone. I read about children in cages, With no one to comfort them there; And they’re told to drink water from toilets And I can’t shake my sense of despair. I write letters and I sign petitions, And I do all the things that I ought; And I tried to make sense of this chaos So I read the Mueller report. With no evidence of collusion, It seemed Trump might get off scott free. But then I read Vo-o-lume Two and It all became clearer to me. CHORUS: He’s guilty as sin, and we’re gonna win, Sooner or later the truth will prevail. There’s no doubt the truth will come out, And the bastard is going to jail. It might happen later than sooner, But it’s something that’s worth fighting for, So we’ll read and we’ll march and we’ll rally And we’ll kick Trump’s ass right out the door! REPEAT CHORUS In all of his state of delusion, He won’t let the people be heard. Now he thinks that he’ll be re-elected... But the people will have the last word. We’ll vote him out, without any doubt; The people finally will be heard. Voters have clout and we’ll vote him out, “You’re fired!” will be our last word.
tune: My Bonnie Lies Over the Ocean

title: Chinga la Migra
lyrics: We don't want Palantir 's nose in our lives Not our phone calls, or schooling or the messages we send our friends Not our travels, or our browsing, or the books we—like to read We must stop Palantir Stop them today! We must stop Palantir Stop them today! Chinga la migra That means Screw ICE Shout with meaning And conviction No we don’t have to be very nice Cuz they torture, abuse children Palantir helps, Every day! Chinga la migra Is what we say! Chinga la migra Screw ICE today! Palantir (data mining company) co-founder Peter Thiel says the “patriotic” thing to do is for tech to serve U.S. military interests. ICE has large contracts with Palantir and uses the company's software to track undocumented immigrants.

title: Chanson Sur Les Bouteilles de Vin
lyrics:
Chevaliers de la table rond-e, Goûtons voir si le vin est bon
Chevaliers de la table rond-e, Goûtons voir si le vin est bon.
Goûtons voir, oui oui oui,
Goûtons voir, non, non, non
Goûtons voir si le vin est bon. [bis]

Mais après, quand les bouteilles sont vid-es,
Qu’est-ce qu’on fait? Où doit-on les jeter?
Mais après, quand les bouteilles sont vid-es,
Qu’est-ce qu’on fait? Où doit-on les jeter?
Où jeter, oui oui oui
Où jeter, non non non
Qu’est-ce qu’on fait? Où doit-on les jeter? [bis]

Si on les jett-e dans la poubelle
Combien d’elle-s seront perdues?
Si on les jett-e dans la poubelle
Combien d’elle-s seront perdues?
Seront perdues oui oui oui
Seront perdues non non non
Combien d’elle-s seront perdues? [bis]

Dans les crevasses de la ter-re
In-u-til-es pour toute é-ter-nit-é.
Dans les crevasses de la ter-re
In-u-til-es pour toute é-ter-nit-é.
Éternité oui oui oui
Éternité non non non
In-u-til-es pour toute é-ter-nit-é. [bis]

Mais vingt sous de dépôt chacun-e
Peut donner un av’nir bien plus beau.
Mais vingt sous de dépôt chacun-e
Peut donner un av’nir bien plus beau.
Bien plus beau, oui oui oui
Bien plus beau, non non non
Peut donner un av’nir bien plus beau . [bis]

title: Oil on Trains
lyrics:
I’m asking if you know what’s going on
Please tell me if you know what’s going on.
Does the CP railroad tell you
When they’ve got stuff that might fell you
In the trains that come through here and carry on?

Is tar-sands oil on a danger list?
Can we tell them we don’t want it– get my gist?
Are we ready for a spill
That could unleash many ills:
And if not, how can we bear the risk?

Je vous demande si vous savez bien
Ce qui est transporté dans tous ces trains
Les ferroviair(es) vous informent-elles
Quand les substance(es) peuvent être mortelles
Qui pass(ent) par nos maisons et nos jardins.

L’huil(e) et l’pétrol(e) sont dangereux
On n’aim(e) pas ça, on n’en veut pas – comprenez?
ça dévers(e), c’est malheureux
Alors quoi fair(e)? – qui appeler?
Est-ce qu’on est prêt pour nettoyer?
tune: She'll be Coming Round the Mountain

title: BOTTLED WATER
lyrics: Forget bottled water It's worse for your health than you think. Chemicals transfer to YOU Every time that you drink! Those plastic bottles Are so bad for you and the planet Corporate control of water Let's all work to ban it!

title: Wind and Solar
lyrics: Wind and solar (2 times) Wind and solar (2 times) Wind and solar (2 times) Wind and solar (2 times) There are currently two big problems our nation has to face. We need more jobs and less pollution to save the human race! No more oil, coal or nuclear .... The answer is now all too clear Wind technician's the fastest growing job in our nation and solar is so cheap soon we won't need dirty gas stations. We need a president who cares .... We don't need yet more methane flares! We must kick out Trump and his cronies whose hearts are so damn cold they're selling off all future life for a few more bars of gold! We are the new progressives We are no longer passive! Our backbones are made of steel (very slow & loud) and WE DEMAND THE GREEN NEW DEAL NOW!!!

title: For Our Grandchildren's Sake
lyrics: Our nation has people in desperate straits. It's high time we care for the United States for we are the people we must liberate. End corporate rule for our grandchildren's sake! End corporate rule for our grandchildren's sake! Our bridges and highways are falling a-part. Most leaders in Washington don't have a heart. They spend all our money on killing and hate Let's re-build at home for our grandchildren's sake! Let's rebuild at home for our grandchildren's sake! We're overextended. We're stretched to the max, expecting our grand-kids to pay it all back. To bankrupt our nation's a tragic mistake. Let's bring home our troops for our grandchildren's sake! Let's end violence for everyone’s sake! Our wars are atrocities, driven by lies. At home we let job loss and poverty rise. WHAT kind of world do you want to create? Let's stop waging wars! (shout) STOP!
songwriter: Marcy Matasick, Albuquerque RG/((Revised for Tucson Gaggle 08/08/17) by Lee

title: La La La La Greed Goes Oo!
lyrics:
Capitalism  has reduced everything

to no more than simple corporate bling.

The world is now entirely run by demagogues

and they are all interested in only one thing.

                        Money here, money there...

                        Greed goes o-o-on!

                        La la la la Greed goes on!

Fossil fuels are creating a Hell on Earth!

But corporate interests really do not care!

So long as corporate shares increase in daily worth

they will keep drillin', and scrapin' the planet bare!

                        Profit here, profit there...

                        Greed goes on!

                        La la la la Greed goes on!

Plants and animals are dying everywhere!

The greedy rich don't get it that we're linked.

If they don't wise up there will be one thing they'll share...

Just like us they all will soon become extinct!

                        Denial here, denial there...

                        in the end

(very slow)->   La la la we'll all be gone!
tune: Tune of "Ob-la-di, O-la-da, Life Goes On"

title: HR676
lyrics: There's a secret some candidates do not want you to kno-o-ow. H R six seven six is a bi-ill that will.... save you lots and lots of dough! It's the on-ly health care bill that'll co-ver ev'ry-o-o-one for one hun-dred per-cent of ev-er-y-thing....with out-of-pock-et costs of NONE! The av'rage vo-ter who's not a mill-ion-ai-ai-aire will save between four and nine thou-sand doll-ars a year! Ber-nie San-ders' bill leaves out those need-ing long-term ca-a-are. Mak-ing el-der-ly and the dis-abled stay under Med-i-caid is not fair. Med-i-caid is state-run and for you to qual-i-fy-y-y you must be pen-ni-less and the state takes your home when-ev-er you fine'ly die! H R six seven six leaves no one ou-ou-out! But to get it passed we all must scream n' shout! That's 'cause the ne-o-li-ber-al and right wing can-di-da-a-ates are funded by for-pro-fit health in-sur-ance.... that we all know is third rate! They come up with pho-ny plans that may sound good at fi-ir-irst. Don't be fooled be-cause there's o-on-ly one.... that real-ly won't rob your purse! De-mand that an-y can-di-date on your li-i-ist must pledge to fight for H R six seven si-i-ix ! H R six seven six is real health care! It will make our health care sys-tem fair! H R six seven si-ix.... that's the one It's up to all of us to get it done! SO DEMAND IT.......... NOW!

title: Ain't No Sunshine Since He's Here
lyrics: Ain't no sun-shine since Trump's he-e-ere. On-ly dark-ness ev'-ry da-a-ay. Ain't no sun-shine since he's here and it fills our hearts with fear that he's plan-nin' a long sta-a-ay. This man stole our e-lec-tio-io-ion. We can't let him get a-wa-a-ay with Su-preme Court se-lec-tions that let big cor-por-a-tions have all things go-ing their wa-a-ay. I know, I know, I know, I know, I know, I know, I know... this seems like a wast-ed thou-ou-ought 'cause our Con-gress has been bou-ou-ght . But u-nite-ed we are stro-o-ong. We'll re-sist, block, and de-la-a-ay. It don't mat-ter ho-ow long we will fight all of his wrongs 'til this con man's locked a-wa-a-ay! (Slowly and deliberately Come No-vem-ber we'll have our sa-a-ay!

title: American Congress
lyrics: A-mer-ican Con-gress and the GEE O PEE-EE-EE... You've made a me-e-ess of the land of the free-ee-ee! Stop blamin' your mistakes on us that just makes us wan'na cuss! Let's just set a few things straight! It's you and your cro-nies who're on the take! Now you li-is-ten to what we sa-ay For each en-ti-tle-ment we've had to pa-ay! You're so stu-pid you just don't get that's what's meant by "en-ti-tle-ment" We pay mon-ey for you to hold n' give back with in'trest when we get old! It's you poli-ti-i-shuns who're on the public do-ole and on the si-ide you've sold your so-oul! cor-po-ra-tions pay you well to drive this coun-try straight to hell! when you re-tire it piss-es me that you'll still get tax-pay-er mon-ey! And fur-ther mo-ore ya' wan'na cut our hea-ealth care to make up fo-or your tax reform wea-ealth care. Well y' bet-ter hope that the e-lite few real-ly will take care of you cause we'll be kick-in' your asses out in e-lec-tions this fall... with-out a doubt! loud-> AMERICAN CONGRESS.... slow--> YOUR... TIME... IS... DO-ONE!

title: Another Saturday Night
lyrics: Another Saturday night and I'm too scared to go out thanks to the pay-offs from the NRA. They've bought off Congress to allow more gun sales so anyone can blow us a-way! ANYTIME! What we need are some common sense gun laws Let's treat guns like we do cars right now. Reg-is-tra-tion... lic-en-sing with tests and proof of insurance... THAT'S HOW! Oh, it's Saturday night and I'm a won-der-in' just when voters will fine-ally get fed up and say Congress, you will now do what we want OR YOUR CAREER'S THE NEXT THING BLOWN AWAY!

title: I’m a Warhead
lyrics: Look at me now, I’m a warhead in a submarine. The Navy takes good care of me, my nukey killing ma-chine. Love me very tenderly, cuz I’m your dreams fulfilled. Ura-ni-um, Tri-tium, Deu-teer-ium too, will shine so radiantly. I move silent in the deep While the world’s asleep Millions say I’m their se-cu-rity and jobs are guaranteed. Love me very tenderly cuz I’m your dreams fulfilled. The best explosive weaponry of the century. Lithi-um makes tri-tium, fusion makes neutrons Uranium sparkplugs are all mine and Plu-toe-nium two-three-nine…. So love me very tenderly cuz I’m your dreams fulfilled. My in-tel-li-gen-ci-a will give you diarrhea. Stra-tee-gic systems are the thing to pro-tect our nation’s ways to say to the world that we are king so it’s whoopie, jubilee. Whoopie, whoopie, jubilee, Your dreams will all be mine. Tell me you’re still thrilled by me at the end of time

title: It's Beginning to Look a Lot Like Impeachment!
lyrics: It's beginning to look a lot like impeachment everywhere Mueller looks. From everything that we hear it's now becoming clear that Trump and all his fam-i-ly are just plain crooks! Now we need to impe-each Mike Pence too-oo but we-ee cannot stop there. While cleaning the Capitol out Kavanaugh and Gorsuch we'll oust! Then go on to dump Trump's whole damn crew!

title: Kavanausea's Everywhere
lyrics: Kav-a-nau-sea's ev'-ry-where! It's our coun-tries worst night-mare! But hold on...(pause) We're not done... (pause) There is some hope! Impeachments... (pause) are com-ing... (pause) they'll pro-vide the an-ti-dote! Demand that Congress save our law by im-peaching Kav-a-naugh! The Con-gress...(pause) can kick him...(pause) out on his butt! But we must...(pause) scream loudly...(pause) Congress still has lots of dumb nuts! De-moc-ra-cy itself's at risk. as long as corp'rate rule ex-ists. This is the fight for our law! We must impeach Kav-e-naugh!

title: Science Here, Science There
lyrics: Sci-ence here, sci-ence there, cli-mate science ev-rywhere! But the cli-mate de-ni-ers are blind. It's the land of the free, so we can't force them to be well in-formed or to o-pen their mind. Wher-e-ver they go, corp-or-a-tions follow dough no mat-ter the plan-et-wide harm. Pho-ny corp'rate sci-ence is the biggest foe of the o-cean, the for-est, and farm. When they say they are "green" it doesn't really mean that they care about trees or the grass. They're just look-in' for a way to plun-der them for pay on the sly, while they cov-er their ass. Wher-e-ver they go, corp-or-a-tions follow dough no mat-ter the plan-et-wide harm. Pho-ny corp'rate sci-ence is the biggest foe of the o-cean, the for-est, and farm. Call your leg-is-lators now. Tell them you have made a vow to un-seat them the next time a-round un-less they'll sup-port taking big bizness to court and pro-mote only sci-ence that's sound! We must end this war on our plan-et near and far and pro-secute all guil-ty parties too! Our suc-cess does not de-pend on wish-in' on a star... WE'RE THE MANY AND THEY ARE THE FEW! (shout) ACT NOW!

title: Climate Change Is Beyond Serious
lyrics: Cli---mate change is beyond ser-i-ous. That is why we're raisin' such a fuss. If we want our planet to sur-vive vote the Green New Deal to stay a-live! So-o-me say that sci-ence is not true. You can arg-ue with them till you're blue. Ra-ther than just getting sad & bleak, raise your voice and join us in the street! Car-bon is ris-ing... Sky high! Spe-cies are dy-ing... NO LIE! End fossil fu-els... WE MUST! Ex-tinction's com-ing... for US! Gla-ciers are melt-ing... Seas rise! For-ests burn up as... Earth fries! Oil's not the an-swer... Wise UP! If we don't stop, we're... Outa luck! Trump and Pence must go, and their cronies and all corp'rate neolib phonies. We can't com-promise a-noth-er inch! To save the Earth we must get off the bench! Now we've only got a dozen years to take action, before our worst fears come to pass........ (very slow)-> Thanks to all those who lie..... if we don't act now we can kiss our butts good bye!!
songwriter: Hank Tusinski 4/25/17, revised by Lee & Marti

title: Look What They’ve Done to Our Earth
lyrics: Look what they've do-one to our Ea-rth, friends! Look what they've do-one to our Ea-rth, friends! The only home that we have got and they're makin' it hotter than hot, friends! Look what they've done to Mother Earth. Look what they've do-one to our a-i-r, folks. Look what they've do-one to our so-i-l, folks. And when the wa-ter is all gone that will be our very last dawn Look what they've done to life itself! Look what they've do-one to huma-a-ni-ty. Look what they've do-one to commu-u-ni-ty. We've got to see that we're all one before this planet comes undone. Truth should always trump insan-i-ty! Look what they've do-one to our fu-u-ture. Look how they're st-e-al-in' our fu-u-ture. Keep that evil force at bay Stand up and tell them "No Damn Way!" DON'T LET THEM STEAL OUR FUTURE!
tune: Look What They've Done to My Song, Ma

title: For the People Act
lyrics: Have you heard the awful news? Voting rights are bein’ abused. The House has passed Bill HR 1 But all their work is bein’ undone. This bill to keep our voting fair Isn’t going anywhere... For the People we all say: “Senate: Don’t stand in our way!” Stand together, everyone; And demand the passage of SB1. It’s called the ‘For the People Act’ Passed in the House now two years back, But McConnell’s kept it on the shelf To protect his power and his wealth. He’s afraid of the people’s vote And the fair reforms that they’d promote. For the People we all say: “Senate: Don’t stand in our way!” Stand together, everyone; And demand the passage of SB1. Expansion of our voting rights Is what we’re fighting for today. Get rid of gerrymandered maps and Let all voters have their say. Get dark money out of our elections; Bring ethics back for our protection. End purges of our voter rolls So all have access to the polls. Stand together, everyone; And demand the passage of SB1. Yes, stand together, everyone; And demand the passage of SB1. NOTE: The ‘For The People Act’ of 2019 (aka HR1) is a bill introduced and passed in the United States House of Representatives in March 2019 to expand voting rights, limit partisan gerrymandering, strengthen ethics rules, and limit the influence of private donor money in politics. With this song, we get a jump on the holiday season, because the best gift we could receive would be the Passage of the “For the People Act.”

title: Taken Away (Updated)
lyrics: We once had a home where our family could come To laugh and to cry and to play, But along came the crash; we were left without cash, And our home was just taken away. Taken away! Our home was just taken away. We can’t be bailed out ’cause we don’t have the clout To get Congress to hear what we say. The rich have their jets, and they hedge all their bets, And they never will see the day When they’re down on their luck and have lost their last buck And their homes are just taken away. Taken away! Their homes won’t be taken away. They’ll all be bailed out ’cuz they’ve got lots of clout So Congress will hear what they say. Now most of us know when the rich run the show That the poor are the first ones to pay. But it never stops there, so we’d all better care Or we all will be singing someday: Taken away! Our homes have been taken away. They can pay for some war that we didn’t vote for, But our homes have been taken away. So we must organize; put a stop to their lies; And take to the streets as we shout: We’re making a choice and reclaiming our voice And we’re rising to throw them all out! And they'll be taken away! Their greed and their theft ends today! We’re making a choice and reclaiming our voice With the poor people leading the way.

lyrics:
v.1 You better watch out
You better not cry
You better not lie to the F – B – I
Adam Schiff is comin’ to town. (tune stays down)

He see’s your Russian meetings
He’s read all your emails
He know that you tried to collude
It isn’t fake news for goodness sake.

You better not cry
You better not tweet that witnesses lied
Adam Schiff is comin’ to town. (tune stays down)

Chorus 2
He knows about the quid pro quo,
The whistle blower’s claims.
Immunity means nothing now,
So you’ll go down in flames.

v.4 You better watch out
You better not cry
You better try on a jumpsuit for size
Adam Schiff is comin’ to town. (tune goes up)

title: Here Comes Rudy
lyrics:
v.1
Here comes Rudy
Here comes Rudy

Ly-ing, cheat-ing, dirty dealing
All ‘cuz of Ukraine.

Chorus 1
Man-a-fort and Flynn and Co-hen all are in the clink.

To pro-tect his buddy Trump from purgering his words.

v.3
Oh….
Here comes Rudy
Here comes Rudy
Going to take the fall.
For the Nar-cis-ist in Chief

title: A Trump-Free Christmas
lyrics:
I’m dreaming of a Trump-free Christmas,
The kind we a-l-l used to know.
Where there was no lying

(last line slow)

lyrics:

Little Donnie – tweet--- ( Pause)----- tweetily deet

Little Donnie – tweet---- ( Pause)----- tweetily deet
Little Donnie – tweet----- ( Pause)---- tweetily deet

title: Our Favorite Things - Davis Gaggle Version
lyrics:
Clean air, clean wa-ter, a livable planet
Healthcare for all and a lot of mass transit
Enough food for everyone, that’s what we sing

Chorus:

we know what we’ll say

Alternate facts and fake news fill their day

Singing to reclaim the country again ˄ (go up)

title: Take Us Out of This Nightmare
lyrics:
v.1
Take us out of this nightmare

Walls and Bans and de-bau..-ch-ery

v.2 (same tune as v.1)
Oh - it’s…Time for ā Rev-o-lu-tion

v.4 (same tune as v.1)

lyrics:
Donald, leave the White House now, We see through ya
Donald, leave the White House now, We see through ya

(Insert name of Representative or Senator) help impeach, We implore ya

Our De-moc-ra-cy's at stake, We abhor ya

Donald, leave the White House now, We see through ya

Freedom lovers give a shout, We need more-of-ya

Donald, leave the White House now, We see through ya
Donald, leave the White House now, We see through ya

title: Song for Immigrants
lyrics:
We need to wake up
We need to wise up
We need to open up our hearts
And do it Now, Now, Now !
We need to build a more just future
And we need to start right now !

We share one planet
With man-made borders
That could be changed, and rearranged
And do it Now, Now, Now!
We need to build a more just future
And we need to start right now !

Fight for fairness
And more awareness
No more race bans, no deport plans.
Do it Now, Now, Now!
We need to build a more just future
And we need to start right now!

Immigration
It is a challenge
But it is one that we can meet
And do it Now, Now, Now
We need to build a more just future
And we need to start right now!

title: Tweeting
lyrics:
Tweeting in the morning, tweeting in the evening, tweeting at
supper time,
Making sure his cronies, love him all the time.

Golf at Mar-a-la-go, hanging at Trump Tow-er, cov-er-ing up each crime
Making sure his cronies, love him all the time.

Privatizing prisons, dirtying our water, building walls no one can climb,
Making sure his cronies, love him all the time.

Demonizing neighbors, hating on the press corps, giving health care not one dime,
Making sure his cronies, love him all the time.

Tweeting in the morning, tweeting in the evening, tweeting at supper time,
Making sure his cronies, love him all the time.

(repeat last line with different versions, fade out)
Making sure that Putin loves him all the time.
Making sure that Exxon, loves him all the time.
Making sure that Wall Street, loves him all the time.

title: Call Your Congress Rep Up, Sport
lyrics:
v.1
Facts tossed out of the window,
Alt-right pulls all the strings.
Trump is trying to scare us,

Chorus
Call your Congress Rep up, sport,
Pin your Senators down!

Pin your Senators down.

v.2

lyrics:
We have to get our voters out to the polls
We have to get our voters out to the polls

We need to fight to make sure all can still vote
We need to fight to make sure all can still vote

We all must volunteer however we can
We all must volunteer however we can

lyrics: Tax Cuts (neck cutting gesture) Tax Cuts Only the rich get tax cuts Bet your bottom dollar, they will always grasp for more. (grabbing gesture) Tax Cuts (neck cutting gesture) Tax Cuts Growing their wealth with tax cuts Putting all their dollars, in accounts they keep off shore (thumb gesture) Tax Cuts (neck cutting gesture) Tax Cuts Bribing our pols for tax cuts Lawyers and accountants, help them rob the Federal store ( ½ gesture guns; ½ gesture hands up) Tax Cuts (neck cutting gesture) Tax Cuts Holding our breath for tax cuts Don't expect to see none, cause they’re greedy to the core

lyrics:
Put your hand in the hand of the women who came before ya

(Rest, Clapping)

(Rest, Clapping)

(Rest, Clapping)

title: Me Too
lyrics:
Me Too .... Me Too,
My boss has got to go
He hits on me day after day
And won't..... hear no…

He won't hear no..... Oh no.
That's why he's got to go.
He gropes and leers, engenders fears
He needs..... to go

Me Too, Me Too..... Me Too
We protest till we're blue
We must all say enough's enough
Me Too.....   ME TOO!! (Shout)
