title: We're Rising Up Against Guns
lyrics:
We’re the Raging Grannies and we’re here to take a stand,
To stop the slaughter of our children all across this land,
We ask for more than prayers and tears, it’s laws that we demand.
We’re rising up today!

Chorus: No more shootings, no more hating.
Families rise, we’re tired of waiting,
Hoping our politicos will finally do what’s right
#ENOUGH, it’s time to fight!

We need to settle arguments with words, not grab a gun.
We need to offer mental health-care now for everyone.
Lawmakers need to work for us – their greed must be undone.
We’re rising up today.

Repeat Chorus

Money from the N-R-A is tainted with our tears.
Spineless politicians line their pockets, that’s our fear.
Guns or children, make the choice…the answer’s very clear.
We’re rising up today!

Repeat Chorus

Regulating guns does not mean taking them away…
It’s eas-ier now to buy a gun than drive on the freeway.
Background checks at gun shows should begin without delay.
We’re rising up today!

Repeat Chorus

I’d like to know why people need to own A-R-fif-teen’s?
Assault rifles have no good use, they’re just killing machines!
Let’s set some limits, use good sense, for that we’re very keen.
We’re rising up today!

Repeat Chorus - sing last line slowly with emphasis

title: Register to Vote Today
lyrics: If you want to have a say, Re-gis-ter to vote today. Show up at your poll-ing place To cast your bal-lot in the race. Chorus: You don’t like ’em, VOTE ‘EM OUT! They don’t listen, VOTE ‘EM OUT! They’re on our side, vote ‘em in! That gives ALL of us a win. Vo-ting keeps our de-mo-cracy strong. If you don’t heed our lit-tle song, It’s your fault when the votes are in If the one you want-ed did not win. Chorus: You don’t like ’em, VOTE ‘EM OUT! They don’t listen, VOTE ‘EM OUT! They’re on our side, vote ‘em in! That gives ALL of us a win. With-out a vote you have no voice. Let Con-gress know you want a choice. So let them know what they should do. Po-lit-i-cos should WORK FOR YOU! Chorus: You don’t like ’em, VOTE ‘EM OUT! They don’t listen, VOTE ‘EM OUT! They’re on our side, vote ‘em in! That gives ALL of us a win.

title: Your Vote Counts
lyrics:
Re-gister now
Re-gister now
Save the world
Save the world
Keep fools out of pow-er
We need you in this ho-ur
Your vote counts
Your vote counts

You are the fu-ture
You are the fu-ture
It’s in your hands
It’s in your hands
Don’t look back with re-gret
It’s no-ot too late yet
Your vote counts
Your vote counts

title: If You Want To Save Our Planet
lyrics:
If you want to save our planet, clap your hands.
If you want to save our planet, clap your hands.
It gets warmer every minute….so it’s time we all begin it.
If you want to save our planet, clap your hands.

If you want to save a glacier, clap your hands.
If you want to save a glacier, clap your hands.
If you get your power from solar…..you can save a bear that’s polar.
That’s a way to save the planet, clap your hands.

If you like to drink fresh water, clap your hands.
If you like to drink fresh water, clap your hands.
But-if your water is in plastic….. sure the outcome will be drastic.
Use your good canteen instead, and clap your hands.

If you want to save the forests, clap your hands.
If you want to save the forests, clap your hands.
All the paper you recycle…… makes your trash into a trifle.
Leaving many more trees standing on our land

If you want to save the earth from CO2,
If you want to save the earth from CO2,
Ride to work on your “bi-sickle”….. cut your gas down to a trickle,
There are lots of other things that we can do!

If you want to stop disasters getting worse,
If you want to stop disasters getting worse,
Leave petroleum in the ground…and keep those windmills spinning round
Failing now to act becomes a curse.
tune: If You're Happy and You Know It

title: This Climate's Yours, Green New Deal's Mine
lyrics:
v. 1 This climate’s yours
This climate’s mine
Across all bound’ries
And border lines
In any weather
We work together
This climate depends on you and me.

v.2 As I go walking
The halls of Congress
At times it seems
Completely hopeless
The fossil lobby
Has so much money
(Still) we know it depends on you and me.

v.3 But the sun keeps shining
And the winds keep blowing
And Green New Deal foes
We keep opposing
For-ces are shifting
People are list’ning
The Green New Deal can be re-al-i-ty.

v.4 This climate’s yours
This climate’s mine
Across all bound’ries
And border lines
We’ll work together
In any weather
This climate depends on you and me…..
This climate depends on you and me.

title: Float the Boat
lyrics:
Float, float, float the boat,
Trickle down no more.
Dump Trump overboard
He’s rotten to the core.

Float, float, float the boat,
We need health care for all.
When we’re not ill, we all can work.
And wealth will rise, not fall.

Float, float, float the boat,
Vote The Green New Deal.
Save the earth and make good jobs
And help our country heal.

Float, float, float the boat,
Make the weakest strong.
Learn to paddle together again,
A land where all belong.

Float, float, float the boat,
Paddle hard upstream.
Make our nation whole once more.
Restore the American Dream.

title: Saints Go Marching for Climate
lyrics: Do the first line of each verse as a Call and Response to involve the audience (1) When C-O-2…..has been reduced When C-O-2 has been reduced Oh, how I want to be in that number, When C-O-2 has been reduced Variations: (2) When climate change…has been reversed (3) When we all love….our Mother Earth (4) When climate is….still safe for all (5) When polar bears….still have some ice (6) When carbon fuels….have been replaced (7) When we all work…to save the earth
tune: When the Saints Go Marching In

title: Climate Emergency
lyrics: Congress ... we need you to re-a-lize (“congress” quick & punchy each time) We said, Congress, plee-eze open your eyes We said, Congress, all the seas will soon rise And massive fi-res will be raaa-ging White House ... there is no time to spare (“White House” quick & punchy each time) We said, White House, we all breathe the same air We said, White House, now is time to repair Our fragile ov-er hea-ted pla-net Chorus: (CLAP 1, 2, 3) We're facing one big climate em-er-gen-cy one big climate em-er-gen-cy We're facing one big climate em-er-gen-cy one big cli-mate em-er-gen-cy Judges ... we don't need fossil fuels (“Judges” quick & punchy each time) We said, judges, you can write some new rules We said, judges, let's give all of us tools To safely ditch -excess - carbon Neighbors ... it is now up to you (“neighbors” quick & punchy each time) We said, neighbors, you know what you should do We said, neighbors , save our water and air It's com-mon sen-se and mo-r-ally fair Chorus: (CLAP 1, 2, 3, ) We're facing one big climate em-er-gen-cy one big cli-mate em-er-gen-cy (Fade out) We're facing one big climate em-er-gen-cy one big cli-mate em-er-gen-cy

title: Daisy Wants an EV
lyrics:
Daisy, Daisy,
Marry me – say “I do”.
We’ll make our get-away
On a bicycle built for two.
For ev-e-ry mile we don’t drive,
We help to make our Earth thrive.
We’ll take a hike; we’ll ride a bike!
Our en-vir-on-ment will love you!

Michael, Michael,
I have a diff’rent plan.
Let’s get an electric car;
Then you will be my man!
We won’t spew out C-O-2,
And I can save my hairdo!
Just plug it in, then we all win!
In our E-V I’ll feel just grand!
songwriter: Granny Jeanette (modified from Bicycle Song, Raging Grannies Songbook 1993, unknown Gaggle)

title: Another War
lyrics:
Now, they want to start another little war
a beautiful, exciting little war
They will rain the missiles down, on every bleepin' town
in that dreadful, but exciting little war

World War Three is Donald’s re-election plan
He said war’s the only way to win new fans
Said he’s “weak and ineffective and can only get elected
if he starts a major conflict with Iran.”

Corporate media is breathless, they’re so glad
‘cause their ratings are enhanced when things are bad
Oh, we panic when we think we’re on annihilation’s brink
And here we are – we’re in the hands of one who's mad!

They say Boeing has new aircraft they must sell
Lockheed Martin wants to boost their shares as well
Also good ol' Northrup Grumman wants to keep their fact'ries hummin'
Plus more bucks for Exxon Mobil and for Shell

War results in such a lot of refugees
They are hungry and they're tired and they freeze
We ignore them and we scorn them and with platitudes we warn them
And refuse to let them enter our country

So stock prices, they go up 'most every day,
While our morals and our ethics, they decay
All the killing and destruction only leads to mass corruption
Now it’s up to us to find a better way!

Do we want a psychopath for President
who expects to be adored for starting war,
who would rather kill us all, than face his failure in the polls?
Or is it time for us to show him to the door?

title: Trump's Legacy
lyrics:
If you’re guilty and you know it, try attack – yes, attack
You’re a failure and you know it, try attack – yes, attack
Just create a big distraction
Later, justify the action
You're a loser with no talent, so attack

We'll be glad to see you go, we all will cheer – hip, hooray!
Let the door swing back and hit you on the rear – hip, hooray!
You would like to think we're grieving
at the prospect of you leaving,
But there's not a living soul to shed a tear

Oh, impeachment's gonna be your legacy – legacy
As a failure you'll go down in history – history
Everything you do is rotten
You will quickly be forgotten
You're impeached, and that will be your legacy
tune: If Youʻre Happy and You Know It, Clap Your Hands

title: I Couldn't Sleep Last Night
lyrics:
I couldn't sleep last night
I read his tweets last night
I wish I could ignore
his crazy ramblings,
the fear and hate he brings
He keeps inflicting more

He’s at the helm:
we're overwhelmed with horror
at such a creep in our white house!
He occupies our heads
we can't escape the dread
We want him out! out! out! – right now!
tune: I Could Have Danced All Night

title: Workplace Safety
lyrics: CHORUS: We’re gonna rise, we’re gonna rise, For workplace safety now! We’re gonna rise, we’re gonna rise, For Fifteen and a Union now! Oh, we rise today in Durham and we’re singing loud and strong ’Cause the conditions at McDonald’s are unsafe and they’re all wrong. And this fight for a safe workplace has gone on for far too long... So we rise together now! When the workplace is unsafe and leads to burns and cuts and falls We know an injury to one must be an injury to all So we’ll sing out our demands and say: “McDonalds, hear our call... For workplace safety now!” REPEAT CHORUS We’re here singing for a union ’cause that is the only way For working folks to know that they’ll be safe at work today. And we’ll unionize and win the right for safety and fair pay... We’re gonna rise together now! Oh, the “Right to Work” is bogus and it’s got us in a snit, ‘Cause it means the right to work for less without those benefits. So we’ve come to Durham now to raise our voices loud and strong, Now join us in our song! REPEAT CHORUS

title: Raging for Social Security
lyrics:
We're <u>ragin</u>’ for Social Security. Hooray! Hooray!
To pro<u>tect</u> us in our maturity. Hooray! Hooray!
It’s a <u>tax</u> that we’ve al<u>ready</u> paid, to protect us in our <u>gold</u>en days...
We’ve <u>paid</u> the tax, now they’re <u>breaking</u> our backs,
And we <u>won’t</u> be fooled no <u>more</u>!

We paid all through our working lives. Hip hip! Hooray!
Don’t <u>take</u> it away! Don’t even try! No way! No way!
They’re <u>lying</u> and trying to <u>pri</u>vatize, and <u>pull</u>ing the wool right <u>over</u> our eyes.
We’ve <u>paid</u> the tax, now they’re <u>breaking</u> our backs,
And we <u>won’t</u> be fooled no <u>more</u>!

<u>Ev</u>’ry worker pays the tax. It’s true! It’s true!
But <u>they</u> might never get it back! Will you? Or you?
The un<u>doc</u>umented, <u>they</u> pay too, and <u>even</u> our grand<u>chil</u>dren do,
But will they <u>ever </u>see the benefits?
That’s <u>up</u> to me and you!

Our <u>So</u>cial Security isn’t broke! Hooray! Hooray!
So this <u>plan</u> is nothing but mirrors and smoke! No way! No way!
The <u>fat</u> cats get richer <u>by</u> the day, while the <u>old</u> and the poor are the <u>ones</u> to pay.
We’ve <u>paid</u> the tax, now they’re <u>breaking</u> our backs,
And we <u>won’t</u> be fooled no <u>more</u>!

<u>So</u>cial Security cushions us all. Hooray! Hooray!
But we’re <u>being</u> set up for an awful fall. No way! No way!
<u>Pri</u>vate investment can <u>just</u> go bust, and <u>then</u> what happens to <u>all</u> of us?
We’ve <u>paid</u> the tax, now they’re <u>breaking</u> our backs,
And we <u>won’t</u> be fooled no <u>more</u>!

<u>So</u>cial Security’s easily fixed. Hooray! Hooray!
Just <u>lift</u> the cap that protects the rich! Today! Today!
The <u>rich</u> should pay the <u>same</u> as the poor, on <u>ALL</u> of their income; we <u>ask</u> no more.
So it’s <u>time</u> we all stood <u>up</u> to say:
“We <u>won’t</u> be fooled no <u>more</u>!”

title: Now You've Pissed Off Grandma
lyrics:
You made us <u>angry </u>when you raised all those <u>taxes</u> on the poor;
We were <u>out</u>raged when you authorized those <u>pipe</u>lines;
But you’ll <u>really</u> hear us roar
If you <u>start</u> another war.
You’re a <u>mad</u>man, and now you’ve pissed off <u>grand</u>ma!

You’re a <u>bully</u> and a thief, always <u>lying</u> through your teeth,
And a <u>pussy</u>-grabber, too, there’s no de<u>n</u>ying;
But you’ll <u>really</u> hear us roar
If you <u>start</u> another war.
You’re a <u>mad</u>man, and now you’ve pissed off <u>grand</u>ma!

Social Se<u>cur</u>ity’s in danger and our <u>Med</u>icare is, too,
And folks are <u>dying</u> every day for lack of <u>health</u> care.
So you’ll <u>really</u> hear us roar
If you <u>start</u> another war.
You’re a <u>mad</u>man and now you’ve pissed off <u>grand</u>ma!

Well, you <u>want</u> to build a wall, but there’s <u>no</u> wall that’s so tall
That it can <u>keep</u> out truth and justice and com<u>pas</u>sion.
So we’ll <u>keep</u> on singing strong
’til we Grannies right these wrongs
And vote you <u>out,</u> ’cause you’ve really pissed off <u>grand</u>ma!

title: What's COVID-19?
lyrics: COVID-19, COVID-19 What is that, what is that? Invisible virus, Invisible virus That has spread, that has spread Take precautions, take precautions Extra care, Extra Care Let’s try not to spread it, Let’s try not to spread it Wash your hands, Wash your hands No racism, no racism In our town, in our town Don't go by ethnicity, Don't go by ethnicity Just calm down, just calm down Why is Mike Pence, Why is Mike Pence Put in charge, put in charge His lack of credentials, His lack of credentials Is so large, is so large Stop the cu-uts, stop the cu-uts To healthcare, to healthcare Epidemics happen, Epidemics happen Be prepared, be prepared

title: When Raging Grans Come Marching In
lyrics:
When Raging Grans / come marching in,
When Raging Grans come marching in.
We invite you to be in that number
When Raging Grans come marching in.

We’ve got to turn our lives around.
We’ve got to turn our world around.
We’re singing for peace on our planet
And for clean air, water and ground.

Or common future / starts right today,
To those in power we say Hey –
You better listen to Grandma’s clamour;
We’re empowered and we’re on our way!
tune: When the Saints Come Marching In

title: Selling Arms to Saudi Arabia
lyrics: How much for those tanks in the desert That General Dynamics will build To be used and abused by the Saudis And causing us all lots of guilt. CHORUS: Cancel, cancel, Cancel all arms sales to Saudi Arabia Cancel, Cancel, cancel all sales of arms! The billions we earn are blood money Are the jobs worth the killing they'll cause? This contract is really quite horrid This contract has too many flaws! CHORUS: Cancel, cancel, Cancel all arms sales to Saudi Arabia Cancel, Cancel, cancel all sales of arms! The Grannies are really quite angry That Canada has signed this deal. The Saudis are really quite happy That our arms will help them to kill! CHORUS: Cancel, cancel, Cancel all arms sales to Saudi Arabia Cancel, Cancel, cancel all sales of arms!
tune: My Bonnie Lies Over the Ocean

title: Pandemic Parody
lyrics: I'm tired of hav-ing to stay home. I just wanna be free to roam. E-ev-'ry time I turn on the tube I see an orange id-i-ot and his Mike prude!... I need a time machine just be-cause I want to go back a-gain... to when I thought that pan-de-em-ic was... the name of a fast food chain! ... We used to wear masks to get a treat, not for vi-ral de-feat. Those of us who this vi-rus won't kill... will drop dead... …from our Am-azon bill! . And what's the toi-oi-let pa-per thing? Is it some ver-sion of "bling"? Or is there a nash'nal con-spir-ir-a-cy? ... Is it our new cur-ren-cy? ... There's fine'ly a list that the U.S. troops for DEATHS that we could have stopped! When it comes down to our peo-ple's health... we stop at no-thing... (pause) to save Wall Street's wealth! ... Corporatism's the prob-lem And we can no longer stall! STOP... WOR-shipping PRO-fits and GREED We NEED what's BEST for ALL! MEDICARE FOR ALL.......YESTERDAY!
tune: Take Me Out to the Ball Game

title: George Floyd
lyrics:
George Floyd. Never made it home.
Knee on the neck and cops standing by.
No! I will not let this go-o-o.

Eight minutes, forty-six seconds.
George called “Please, I can’t breathe.”
“My neck hurts.” “They’re going to kill me.”

George Floyd. Here we stand.
With our brown and black family.
Stop police killing unarmed black folk.

STOP!

title: No More Plastic
lyrics: NON! AUX PLASTIQU-ES QUI EMBALL-ENT NOS PRODUITS: ILS NE SE RECYCLENT PAS, EN FAIT - ILS SONT TOXIQUES. Les métaux et le ver-re se recyclent: oui, c’est vrai, Mais les emballages plastiqu-es ne peuvent pas s’y ajouter. NO MORE PLASTIC! PLASTIC MUST BE BANNED. OR THERE WILL BE DESOLATION ACROSS OUR LOVELY LAND All those one-use plastic bags and bubbles for our pills, Can never be recycled, and create pollution ills. Texaco and Nestlé, Exon-Mobile, and BP Want us to think those plastics are as safe as safe can be. Big petro corporations have been pushing us around To make us think recycling’s the solution they have found: Just flash the word “recycle” and all problems go away: BUT ONLY 2 PERCENT OF PLASTICS CAN BE USED ANOTHER WAY. NON! AUX PLASTIQU-ES QUI EMBALL-ENT NOS PRODUITS: ILS NE SE RECYCLENT PAS, EN FAIT - ILS SONT TOXIQUES. Les métaux et le ver-re se recyclent: oui, c’est vrai, Mais les emballages plastiqu-es ne peuvent pas s’y ajouter. NO MORE PLASTIC. RECYCLING’S NOT THE KEY. RECYCLING’S JUST A SCAM TO PUT THE LOAD ON YOU AND ME. Those handy one-use plastics that can seem so safe and chic, End up in oceans, woods and lakeshores, in every winding creek. They cannot be recycled so we must use some cleaner ways To package and to carry the things we use every day. SINGLE-USE PLASTICS: THEY ARE KILLING US, AND THAT’S THE REASON WHY WE ARE MAKING SUCH A FUSS.

title: Save Our Postal Service
lyrics: We’re the Raging Grannies and we’re raging here today, ’Cause it’s time for working people to stand up and have their say. Cut the tax breaks for the rich and give the workers their full pay! Save our Postal Service now! CHORUS: We support our postal workers! We support our postal workers! It’s time to rally ’round and say “no way you’ll shut us down!” Save our Postal Service now! We support our teachers, and our farmers planting crops, And we say the war on Postal Workers simply has to stop. Through rain and sleet, on ev’ry street, they never let us down, (So) Save our Postal Service now! REPEAT CHORUS They’ve tried before today to close our Postal Service down, Like they’ve tried to cut our social nets and leave us all to drown In student debt and health care bills we can’t afford to pay.... “Enough’s enough!” we Raging Grannies say! REPEAT CHORUS We’re tired of their privatizing; change is overdue. We’re tired of their lies and we are tired of being screwed! But we’re the 99 percent – we’re mighty, they are few. Save our Postal Service now! REPEAT CHORUS
tune: Battle Hymn of the Republis (John Brown's Body)

title: The Vote Song
lyrics: THE VOTE SONG ( TUNE: Clap your Hands) Montreal Raging Grannies IF YOU CAN’T BE BOTHERED VOTING THINK AGAIN ( 2X) IF YOU CAN’T BE BOTHERED VOTING KEEP IN MIND AND IT’S WORTH NOTING THAT THE ONES WHO GOT US IN THIS MESS MIGHT WIN. IF YOU CAN’T BE BOTHERED SORTING WHO IS WHO ( 2X) IF YOU DON’T TAKE CARE TO WEIGH EACH NEW PROMISE OF THE DAY THEN PREPARE TO LIVE WITH WHAT THEY CHOOSE TO DO. ST TU VEUX QUE LES CHOSES CHANGENT, VA VOTER, AU LIEU DE TOUJOURS TE PLAINDRE, VA VOTER. IL SUFFIT PAS DE CHI/A/LER; IL FAUT SUSSI T’EXPRIMER; SI TU VEUX QUE L’ON T’ENTENDRE, VA VOTER! OH DEMOCRACY’S A NUISANCE YOU MIGHT SAY BUT WE WOULD NOT PREFER ANOTHER WAY YES, WE WOULD ALWAYS CHOOSE IT WE USE IT OR WE LOSE IT SO VOTE AND YOU WILL ALWAYS HAVE A SAY. IF YOU CAN’T BE BOTHERED VOTING DO NOT BITCH (2 X) A POLITICIAN’S NOT A SAINT SOMETIMES HONEST FOLKS THEY AIN’T BUT IF YOU CAN’T BE BOTHERED VOTING DO NOT BITCH!

title: Vote!
lyrics: Let’s all get out the vote A time for all to note: That’s everyone we know, That’s every friend and foe. The way they spend your dough May make you go “uh-oh!” Then this would be a way To clearly have your say. Voter c’est important Pour tout un monde de gens; Ceux qui sont supprimés, L’moment de s’exprimer. Les pauvres, les sans-abris, Les autochtones aussi N’ont pas assez de voix Sans nos votes dans la boîte. C’est le temps d’aller voter. Il faut vous exprimer, Pour vous representer; Choisir votr’ conseiller. Dans une démocratie Les élus sont choisis. Faîtes entendre votre voix: Au scrutin soyez-là.

title: Save Our Postal Service (Redux)
lyrics: We’re the Raging Grannies and we’re raging here today ’Cause someone’s messing with our mail and we’re not gonna play! Mail boxes and voting sorters being hauled away... That’s got to stop today! CHORUS: We support our Postal Service! We support our Postal Service! It’s time to rally ’round and say “no way you’ll shut us down!” Save our Postal Service now! Slow down the mail, slow down the votes, it’s plain as it can be That you’re out to save yourself by killing our democracy. Vets denied their medicines and rent checks now delayed... That’s got to stop today! Repeat Chorus These tactics risk our precious votes; it’s sabotage for sure. We know that what you’re doing’s just to keep your job secure. We see right through your tricks and lies, a danger to us all... So we’ll save our Postal Service and we’ll vote you out this Fall. Repeat Chorus
tune: Battle Hymn of the Republic (aka John Brown's Body)
songwriter: Ellen Canavan, Jade Dell, Libby Johnson, and Vicki Ryder

title: RBG's Last Wish
lyrics:
I worked all my days, and half the nights, too

opening doors, for all to come through

Now I wait and I wonder, how can I rest in grace?

Before my bones can settle, they’re filling my place.

The world’s topsy-turvy, words don’t mean a thing

No room for grieving, or remembering

Now I wait and I wonder how can I rest in grace?

Before my bones can settle, they’re filling my place.

I asked for no favors because of my sex

just that my brethren take their feet off our necks.

It was my last wish that my seat on the bench

would wait to be filled by a new president

I served to make fairer this world for us all

You must carry on, and live by love’s law

So let my bones settle; there’s no need for haste

Allow me some grace, before filling my place

title: Why Did all the Seniors Die
lyrics:
Why did all the seniors die
During this pandemic
Why did all the seniors die
Many from neglect
Why did all the seniors die
Died from a lack of care
What have we learned from this?
What have we learned from this?

Pourquoi fallait-il qu’ils meurent
Seuls et sans mêm’ un adieu
Pourquoi fallait-il qu’ils meur’
Sans personn’ autour d’eux
Pourquoi fallait-il qu’ils meur‘
On les a abandonnés
Qu’allons-nous fair’ maint’nant
Qu’allons-nous fair’ maint’nant

What will our government do
To make their lives matter
What will our government change
To make their lives count
What will the government do
To make sure no more lives are lost
What have they learned from this?
What have they learned from this?

C’est le temps d’changer les chos’
Pour ne pas les oublier
C’est le temps d’changer les chos’
Pour nos ainés bien-aimés
Que feront nos dirigeants
Pour mieux protéger nos ainés
Que feront nos dirigeants
Ont-ils enfin compris
tune: Where Have all the Flowers Gone

title: Stop This Nomination (Amy Coney Barrett)
lyrics: There was a time in days of old [days of old] When justice mattered, so we’re told [so we’re told] (But now the) cor-por-a-tions own our Supreme Court, (So say good)bye to women’s freedom to abort. We won’t be saved by Roe v Wade [Roe v Wade] Not even if we’re force-a-bully laid [we’re afraid] (A-nd) you can bet that our health care Safety Nets Will be stolen from us if they’ve not been yet. Environmental regs will go away [go away] And the First Amendment will become passé [Oy vey!] (And there will) be more guns to threaten our loved ones Now the Court’s been purchased by the N-R-A. If you watched the hearings then you know [then you know] That Amy Coney Barrett's got to go [we say NO] She was picked by Donald Trump just to save his ugly rump, (So now we’ve) got to stop this shameless horror show! We used to think that we could just appeal [just appeal] To a court where we could get a good fair deal [an honest deal] (But now we’re) fighting for our lives, and if we’re to survive, (We‘ve got to) stop this nomination -- STOP IT NOW! It’s a gross abomination -- STOP IT NOW! For the future of our nation – STOP IT NOW! *Hear the melody at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=A0GPdJlDPVU (We sing only the tune to the verse.)

title: You're a Loser Trump
lyrics:
You’re a loser
You’re a loser
and it’s clear for all the world to see
Of all the crooks, liars, hucksters we’ve crossed
you are one crook that we wish would get lost
You are a con in a million, my friend
You’re nothing more, and you’ll lose in the end
You’re a loser
and you’re never going to win again
You’re a loser
and you should be locked up in a pen
The nasty words and the insults you spew
come back to bite ‘cause they all describe you
Dumb as a rock! a disgrace! crazy!
The worst disaster in world history
You’re a loser
Though you cheat and scam, you cannot win
You’re a loser
‘cause the people don’t believe your spin
You offer nothing but lies, fear and hate
You lack ideas, you just bloviate
We’re tired of hearing you whine and complain
We’ll change the tune, and we’ll sing this refrain:
Kamala!
She’s a winner!
and she is what she appears to be
She’s a winner!
and she’s going to save democracy
We vote for freedom to have our own views
on what we read, whom we love, what we choose
We vote for freedom, we’re on the right track
We’re moving forward, we’re not going back
She’s a winner
and she is what she appears to be
She’s a winner
and she’s going to save democracy
She’s a winner
and she is what she appears to be
She’s a winner
and she’s going to save democracy
Vote!

title: Black Lives Matter
lyrics:
Freedom, justice for us all
That's our call, standing tall
Black lives matter!

Human rights for everyone,
Every daughter, every son
Black lives matter!

We condemn all race discrimination
It’s an ugly stain upon our nation

We need safety in our homes,
where we drive, walk, or run.
Black lives matter!



All the killing has to stop,
Prosecute killer cops
Black lives matter!

Fund the schools instead of jails
help us thrive, win not fail
Black lives matter

Put an end to mass incarceration
Now the people call for reparations

No one is expendable
Everyone’s valuable
Black lives matter!
key_or_starting_note: Key of C, starting note E

title: Have Yourself a True Progressive Christmas
lyrics:
Have yourself a true progressive Christmas
Set your heart a-glow
Let the love & kindness from within you flow

Have yourself a true progressive Christmas
Give your time away
Pick your favorite cause & lend a hand today

All boats rise with a rising tide
Let’s improve all lives, all ways
Keep on striving for equal rights
and for ever brighter days

Every race, religion, age and gender
for them all we’ll fight
Don’t give up ‘til everyone is treated right
Christmas time, and all year long
let’s light the night!
tune: Have Yourself a Merry Little Christmas

title: I'm Dreaming of a Kind Christmas
lyrics:
I’M DREAMING OF A KIND CHRISTMAS

I’m dreaming of a kind Christmas
where refugees have human rights
where no one’s forsaken
and babes aren’t taken
from mama’s arms, by dark of night
I’m dreaming of a kind Christmas
with concentration camps no more
Those who flee from terror and war
shall find loving welcome at our door
tune: I'm Dreaming of a White Christmas

title: Hey, Dudes (anti-nukes, directed toward the new bomb factory at LANL (Los Alamos National Lab)
lyrics:
Hey, dudes, stop making nukes!
Got too many – we sure don’t need any more
Stop selling  destruction, horror and gore
Time to turn back from the brink of a world war

Hey, dudes, try doing good
Side with life, now, and make it better
You're spending a vast amount of our cash
working to blast us to ruin and slaughter

You make up crises based on lies, you demonize
to have an excuse for bombing nations
So stop this reckless march to war we’ve seen before
consider the tragic implications

Hey, dudes, abolish nukes!
Find a good use for LANL’s brain power
Remember, all life on earth is at stake
When will you wake to this urgent hour?

title: God Bless Our Planet Earth
lyrics:
[intro] We are all related on the land and sea
             and we all are yearning to be safe and free
             Let us show our reverence for this world we share
             As we raise our voices in a song and prayer:

God bless our Planet, Earth,
world that we love
Let all creatures, and people
Live in peace, like in heaven above
Bless the continents, and the islands
And the oceans, white with foam
God bless our Planet, Earth,
our home, sweet home
God bless our planet, Earth
our home, sweet home!

title: Down At the Border
lyrics:
Down at the border, it’s shocking to see
human rights violations based on racist policies
It’s inhumane cruelty – let’s stop it today! Hey,
let’s deport Trumpsters! Let immigrants stay!

Folks reach our border in desperate straits
Here they get treated worse than what they fled
and shown such hate!
As if seeking refuge was murderous crime! But,
we know who really should be doing time!

What a barbaric plan for deterrence:
steal their children that they hold so dear
Make them suffer so much that the migrants
would rather die than travel here

Kidnaping children, and jailing them, too
is the Trump policy of state-inflicted child abuse
We must free these babies!
This madness must end!
as for the madman, lock him in a pen!

(ending) Ai-yai-yai-yai we hear their cries!
Ai-yai-yai-yo ICE has to go!
tune: South of the Border, Down Mexico Way
songwriter: The idea for the song came from another gaggle - Marcy Matasick revised it heavily

title: For Immigrants
lyrics:
Listen with heart, you’ll hear their voices calling
The refugees who flee from tyranny
victims of war, of terror and of cruelty
They call to us: to our humanity

So raise your voice, in chorus for the immigrants
for all the Dreamers, and for all their kin
Let’s put an end to demonizing innocents!
Don’t let our politics disrupt their lives again

We sing for all those needing sanctuary
We sing for all who want equality
we welcome them as members of our citizenry
We sing for them, and all humanity

So raise your voice, in song for Lady Liberty!
who raised her lamp in welcome at our shore
Because compassion made this nation strong and free
we’ll never turn our backs, we’ll never shut the door!

title: Incarceration Nation
lyrics:
A couple million people
and many innocents
are doing time, and lots of time –
time and time again
What a waste of their potential
to make them waste away
Seems like justice never was just
in the American way

Involuntary labor
is slav’ry — that’s no lie
‘cause slavery wasn’t ended; it was only corporatized
Big business makes big profits
when people work for free
But the cost is 80 billion:
paid by you and me

The pipeline to the prisons
starts with kids in school
Locks ’em up like criminals for breaking minor rules
Moms, hold onto your babies,
if they are brown or black
‘cause the system’s rigged against ‘em:
you might not get them back

We love to punish people
and strip them of their worth
We’ve got the largest prison population on the earth
We keep filling up the prisons
just to watch them grow
We’re incarceration nation:
How low can we go?
tune: Folsom Prison Blues by Johnny Cash

title: SB-202
lyrics: Georgia peaches, rotted through, SB 202 This bill don’t give a damn ‘bout you, SB 202 With a “No vote” here And a “Screw you” there “You ain’t white Ya don’t need rights Only for us monied types.... Georgia weeps, it’s black & blue, From SB 202 Now, Jim Crow’s got a suit and tie, With SB 202 Justified by the BIG LIE. That’s SB 202 Kemp and Raffens scream For their racist dream “Kill the absentee votes! Make their sites remote! If you knock, it’s jail! Registrations fail! We can use our powers. Make ‘em wait for HOURS.... Inhumane new rules, blocking water and food” That’s SB 202 Well, we ain’t having it, no damn way! SCREW SB 202! We’re mobilizing, heading your way! SHOO SB 202 Got the Grannies wrath, Stacy Abrams’ brass Folks like Barber and Lewis Show us we can all do this Organize, stand firm ‘Gainst the racist worms Turn back their attacks Bend the good arc back.... Make our Founders proud, Fight as long and loud (talk ) as it takes to kill….. Georgia’s S B 2 0 2.

title: Song on Gun Reform
lyrics:
Chorus:
We’re here to sing a song about gun reform, gun reform, gun reform,
We’re here to sing a song about gun reform,
Til weak laws come tumbling down.

Our position is clear on registrations.
It’s a popular position polls say,
Even got support by members of
The good old NRA!
(Chorus)

Banning weapons works and you know it!
Mass shooting numbers went down,
Went up when they lapsed, but you turned your backs
And the bodies lay on the ground.
(Chorus)

Don’t need assault type weapons
Designed to kill in mass.
To protect those near or hunt a deer,
The vote to ban must pass!
(Chorus)

Now listen to our children,
They said it loud and clear,
Support our cry so people won’t die
Or we’ll vote you out of here!!!!
tune: Joshua Fit the Battle of Jericho

title: Merci, NO COUP
lyrics:
1) The <u>Q</u>- Anon and <u>fasc</u>ists have been <u>busy</u> little <u>bees
</u>As <u>they</u> work hard to <u>stage</u> a coup a<u>gainst</u> democra<u>cy
</u>Don’t <u>want</u> your vote if <u>you</u> are brown or <u>black</u> or mixed, you <u>see
</u>Or <u>poor </u>or immi<u>grant</u> or gay, that’s <u>their</u> “democra<u>cy”</u>

2) <u>Damn</u> little idiots, <u>sme</u>lly as skunks
<u>Don’t</u> care for other folks, <u>nothi</u>ng but punks
<u>Got</u> little Grinchy hearts, <u>tin</u>y and gray
<u>Not </u>gonna let ‘em win, <u>NO</u> FREAKING WAY

1) Four <u>hund</u>red bills they’ve <u>craft</u>ed in their <u>dirt</u>y little <u>coup
</u><u>Making</u> sure that <u>voting</u> is as <u>hard</u> as hell for <u>you
</u>Long <u>lines</u> and cutting <u>absen</u>tees are <u>just </u>the start , it’s <u>true
</u>Bring <u>food</u> or water <u>to</u> your friends makes a <u>crim</u>inal of <u>you</u>

2) Weak whiny idiots, <u>hard</u>-hearted slime
<u>De</u>vious thugs who should <u>pay</u> for their crimes
<u>They</u> thought they’d beat us but <u>no</u> frickin’ way
It’s <u>OUR </u>Democracy, <u>We’re</u> here to stay!

1) Their <u>plan</u> is clear, they <u>just</u> want power, they <u>don’t</u> care the ex<u>pense
</u>Fake <u>arg</u>uments and <u>trick</u>y lies are <u>their</u> only de<u>fense
</u>Keep <u>voters</u> white and <u>privileged</u>, lock the <u>rest</u> out with a <u>fence
</u>They <u>think</u> we’ll take it? <u>Man</u>-oh-man are <u>those</u> guys ever <u>dense!</u>

2) <u>Vote</u> out the idiots, <u>pitch</u> them aside
<u>Love </u>can trump hate if our <u>embrace</u> is wide
<u>Every </u>vote matters, hear <u>us</u> as we say
It’s <u>OUR</u> Democracy, <u>We’re</u> here to stay!

1) We’ll <u>march</u> and sing and <u>mo</u>bilize we’ll <u>rant </u>and rage and <u>shout
</u>Let’s <u>crush </u>the coup and <u>pitch</u> those racists <u>out </u>upon their <u>snout
</u>The <u>pow</u>er of the <u>peop</u>le’s what <u>Americ</u>a’s a<u>bout
</u>So <u>call </u>your Rep, write <u>lett</u>ers, make a <u>plan</u> and let’s move <u>out!</u>
songwriter: Candice Davies, with Vicki Ryder and Jade Dell

title: America For the People (For the People Act)
lyrics:
Democracy is under siege: our very right to vote
imperiled by Republicans – the lies that they promote!
   America, America, don’t let corruption win!
   Unite and fight for voting rights. Together we must win!

If all the citizens can vote, Republicans will lose.
They know their policies are trash that voters just won’t choose.
   And so they scam and rig and cheat, and purge the voter rolls,
   and gerrymander and restrict our access to the polls

So Senators, now do your job – democracy’s at stake!
We need the For the People Act – right now, for freedom’s sake!
   America, America, don’t let obstruction win
   Unite and fight for voting rights. Together we must win!
key_or_starting_note: Key of F, starts on C

title: You’ve Got to Change!
lyrics: You’ve got to change your evil ways, Congress, Or the people will stop voting for you. Remember you work for us, Congress, Not for the money that is backing you. You had us voting, donating, text-banking for you. You got elected with your talking but you never come through. This can’t go on….. Lord knows, you’ve got to change. We want the “For the People Act”, Senate. We want the money out of politics too. We want to mail in our ballots, Congress, The same way that you guys do. We won’t be standing and waiting in long lines all day, You need to listen cause we didn’t come here to play. This can’t go on….. Lord knows, you’ve got to change. Here’s what the people are saying, Senate. Voter suppression has got to go. You’ve got to ditch the Fillibuster. We can’t have states overturning our votes. Let’s make it easy for voters to have their choice, Help our post office by firing Louis de Joy. This can’t go on….. Lord knows, you’ve got to change. We want a Green New Deal, Congress. All earth’s creatures are suffering so much. While you keep spending, Congress -- Trillions on war, weapons, killing and such. We’re getting tired of waiting as you fool around While dirty pipelines pollute our rivers and ground. This can’t go on….. Lord knows, you’ve got to change. Repeat Verse 1
tune: You've Got to Change Your Evil Ways
songwriter: Ellen Canavan, Jade Dell and Chris Carlson

title: It Ain't Necessarily So
lyrics:
Our courts are all fair, don’t you know?
The talking heads all tell us so
Though corporate media would like to mislead ya
it ain’t necessarily so!

Alito says "Nix privacy!" - he'd rather see brutality
Beer Brett is a tool, Clarence Thomas a fool
They’re bringing us theocracy

And judge Amy Coat-hanger Barrett
was rammed through regardless of merit
‘cause she was selected to betray her sex
Now we know she’s as shifty as Brett

Old Mitch has been packing the courts
to make it a crime to abort
And all the Republicans, just want to drub women:
crushing our rights is a sport

The freedoms and rights that we know,
just ain’t necessarily so
‘cause what they are brewing will be our undoing
We’re safer in old Mexico

title: Battle Hymn of Women (revised and updated)
lyrics:
Mine eyes have seen the glory of the fire of women's rage
kept smoldering for centuries, now flaming in this age
We won’t go back to hangers, and we will not be enslaved!
We’ll keep on marching on!

Now women-hating men attempt to occupy the land
They legalize misogyny, just like the Taliban
They’re terrorizing women and they’re called Republicans –
Their tyranny be damned!

Rise up, women! Join together! Turn the tables on oppressors
We shall not retreat – not ever! For women’s time has come!

Religious zealots bully women with Medieval rules
They think they’re doing “God’s work” but they’re only being tools
They’re stooges for the power brokers – and their scheme is cruel
But we won’t be subdued!

They want to take us back to when the only rights were men’s
They want to choose how many kids we have and even when
And what we wear, from burkas to bikinis, just for them
Those old ways we condemn!

We’ll keep raging in these rallies No more dying in back alleys!
We are free and ever shall be! For women’s time has come!

So listen, boys – our rights will not be taken or postponed
Our bodies are inviolate: a government-free zone!
My bedroom and my right to choose are mine, and mine alone
For we shall not be owned!

The patriarchy’s over now, we claim our rightful power
Let’s build a new society, with caring at its core,
and never raise our children to be fodder for men’s wars
For women’s time has come!

Rise up, women! Join together! Solidarity forever!
We shall not retreat – not ever! For women’s time has come!

title: The Laws They Are A-Changing
lyrics:
Come gather ‘round people, we want you to hear
about the new laws, they are something to fear
Politicians denying our freedoms, it’s clear
and the damage they do is wide-ranging
Say good-bye to the rights that we women hold dear
For the laws, they are a-changing

Young women who grew up with freedoms don’t know
how barbaric it gets under right-wing control
Those of us who lived through it, our battle scars show:
there’s a reason for all of this raging
Now you’d better get active, or you’re gonna lose Roe!
For the laws, they are a-changing

So men, rest assured, it’s not vengeance we seek
We’re not asking for payback but equality
And just like yourselves, we demand to be free
So you see, we’re not acting so strangely
We are righteous and fair and you all must agree
that our rights must not be cha-a-nging!

title: War vs Climate
lyrics:
Where the hell does all this damnable CO2 come from,
that is dealing our earth such a blow?
Well, a lot of it comes from our acts of aggression
against countries we name as our foes

We must honor our earth, and its inhabitants
We must venerate all things alive
Stop demolishing our planet in the name of our “defense”
Let living things flourish and thrive!

Half our money and resources go to mass-destruction warheads,
(and) to bombers and choppers and tanks,
and to missiles, and to launch pads, ammunition, guns and armor,
and equipment that's used by the ranks

What a terrible waste! What a terrible shame!
throwing resources at waging war
We must put all of that effort toward life-affirming aims,
to have anything worth living for

We have got to stop believing in “security” from warfare
because warfare won’t make us secure
Real security depends on good relations with others
and a planet that’s green, clean and pure

We must honor our earth, and its inhabitants
We must venerate all things alive
Stop demolishing our planet in the name of our “defense”
Let living things flourish and thrive!

title: Drones In the Sky
lyrics:
O, give us a home, where no predators roam,
where no pilot-less, lethal planes fly
where people are safe in their own living space
and death doesn’t rain from the sky!

Drones, drones in the sky
With the purpose of killing they fly
And when their bombs hit  off the target a bit,
many innocent people do die

Now killing’s a breeze when you’re safe overseas
and your victims are dots on a screen
With your mouse you take aim
like a video game
and you can’t hear their terror-filled screams

Drones, drones in the sky
With the purpose of killing they fly
And when their bombs hit off the target a bit,
many innocent people do die

title: Big Oil vs Life On Earth
lyrics:
From the sand dunes down in south Iraq
to the wild Alaskan seas,
we have trashed the earth to pump the oil
just to fuel our SUV's
We have overthrown democracies
to exploit their oil reserves
Intervened in sovereign nation-states
‘cause it’s Big Oil that we serve

Mega-profits go to Texaco,
to BP and Exxon, too
Halliburton, Shell and Conoco
But the cost is paid by you
Many lives and many billions spent
just so profits can be made
by extractive corporations:
yes, it's blood for oil we trade

We must turn things ‘round immediately
Exploitation has to cease
Build a green and clean economy
and it must be based on peace
We reject extractive industries
Let our planet start to heal
Give our kids a world that’s livable
We demand a GREEN NEW DEAL!

title: Our Vision
lyrics:
Mine eyes have seen the glory of a coming world of peace
where poverty is gone and threats of war forever cease
Where every child around the world is safe and loved and free
The world that’s meant to be

Glory, glory, jubilation!
We’ll make peace with every nation
All the world is our relations
Our vision is the key

We reject the grapes of wrath, the bitter grapes of hate and fear
We see harmony with everyone, across the sea and here
And the day when Earth can heal from our abuse is coming near
Let’s see this vision clear!

Glory, glory, jubilation!
We’ll make peace with every nation
All the world is our relations
Our vision is the key

title: SONG FOR A JUST TRANSITION
lyrics:
Our air miles make carbon dioxide,
The oi-l makes tons of debris,
Our planet gets sicker and sicker,
Oh bring back my planet to me

CHORUS
It’s time, Past time
For a just transition to green energy
It’s time, Past time
For transition to green energy

They’re using fresh water for fracking
And to flush down our poo and our pee,
While mines use our lakes as their dump sites!
Oh bring back my planet to me.

CHORUS
C’est l’heure, pas trop tard
Pour la transition juste aux énergies vertes
C’est l’heure, pas trop tard
Pour la transition énergie verte

Corporations can’t patent the sunshine,
But their wealth has to grow constantly
So they plunder the planet for profits,
Oh bring back my planet to me.

CHORUS
It’s time, Past time
For a just transition to green energy
It’s time, Past time
For transition to green energy

We’ve got to do better than tar sands,
And pipelines that go to the sea.
We’re pow-ering up a great movement
To bring back my planet to me.



CHORUS
C’est l’heure, pas trop tard
Pour la transition juste aux énergies vertes
C’est l’heure, pas trop tard
Pour la transition énergie verte

It’s time that we rise up in anger
And reject the whole system of greed
We must find new jobs for our workers
And get them the training they need!

CHORUS
It’s time, Past time
For a Just Transition to green energy
It’s time, Past time
For transition to green energy

Together we’ll work towards creating
New jobs with more green energy
It’s time that we work for some changes
Save our planet for you and for me

CHORUS
C’est l’heure, pas trop tard
Pour la transition juste aux énergies vertes
C’est l’heure, pas trop tard
Pour la transition énergie verte
tune: My Bonnie Lies Over the Ocean

title: To Save the Earth
lyrics:
Well, the <u>cli</u>mate is a-changin’
And the <u>Earth</u> is gettin’ hot,
We’ve got <u>drought</u> and wild fires, and even more;
We’ve got <u>cli</u>mate refugees,
And the <u>ri</u>sing of the seas,
But the <u>worst</u> threat of all is: we’ve got war.

The mili<u>tar</u>y’s planted landmines
Where the <u>flow</u>ers used to grow;
They’ve sprayed <u>na</u>palm, agent orange, poison gasses.
And their <u>great</u>est contributions
To the <u>Earth’s</u> toxic pollution
Are the <u>chem</u>ical weapons from their wars.

Well, they <u>say</u> it’s up to us
To change our <u>light</u>bulbs, don’t eat meat,
And <u>not</u> buy toilet paper anymore.
But we’re <u>not</u> the ones to blame
For their <u>greed</u> or lack of shame
Or all the <u>death</u> and destruction from their wars.

They spend <u>tril</u>lions on the weapons
That de<u>stroy</u> our Mother Earth;
While those war <u>prof</u>iteers just keep on makin’ more,
They keep <u>us</u>in’ fossil fuels
And they <u>take</u> us all for fools
But we <u>know</u> that our worst threat comes from war.

And the <u>ones</u> who know it best
Are the <u>ones</u> who’ve been to war,
So we’re <u>ri</u>sing with one voice to say NO MORE!
For it’s <u>plain</u> for all to see
That there <u>is</u> no Planet B.
To save the <u>Earth</u>, we have <u>got</u> to end all war.

title: Feminist Environmentalists
lyrics: Acknowledging Kay Thode of the Seattle Raging Grannies original version "Radical Environmentalists" and other versions elsewhere on this site. Oh we’re feminist environmentalists, Yes we’re feminist environmentalists We like clean air and clear water Keep our BAY-lands in good order Oh we’re feminist environmentalists Bring us solar, bring us hydro, bring us wind Bring us energy from sources that won’t end So get out and tell the others That the earth is still our mother Join with feminist environmentalists Oh, we’re feminist environmentalists, Yes, we’re feminist environmentalists, Though we’re old we will keep marching We will stop the patriarchy [PAUSE] Cuz we’re feminist environmentalists!

title: One Human Family
lyrics: We’re the Raging Grannies calling out from far and wide, Rising up together like a mighty ocean tide, To stop the wars and killing so we all can live and thrive, One human fam’ly strong. CHORUS: No more wars upon this planet! War’s a crime and it’s a racket! We must learn to live together as we reap what we have sown; One human family strong. We don’t want our children to be taught to fight and harm, And we will work incessantly for nations to disarm. War has never been the answer, so we’re sounding the alarm: No more war, no way! REPEAT CHORUS The hearts of women know that war’s a game that no one wins. We won’t be taken in by all the lies and all the spin. Now’s the time to come together on this grand Memorial Day And demand a better way! REPEAT CHORUS

title: Put Your Finger in the Air (Reproductive Rights edition)
lyrics: Put your finger in the air, in the air, Put your finger in the air, in the air; Put your finger in the air, we need abortion care! Put your finger in the air, in the air! Sing remaining verses in the same pattern: Put your finger on your nose … Sam Alito really blows! Put your finger on your knee … how we do miss RBG! Put your finger on your womb … pregnancy should not spell doom! Put your finger in the shade … we must keep Roe-versus-Wade! Put your finger in the air, in the air, Put your finger in the air, in the air; Put your finger in the air, we need abortion care! Put your finger in the air, in the air!
tune: Put Your Finger in the Air (Woody Guthrie)

title: Mask Up America
lyrics: Note: We wrote and recorded this at the request of a public health activist organization called Mask Together America.In the notes on the youtube video shown here we explain that while in our lyrics we call on Americans to mask up, we believe that it is through worldwide collective solidarity that we will beat covid. Refrain:Mask Together now America Mask Together now AmericaMask Together now America For Together We are Strong In our hands is placed the power to protect both young and old Even people in between them can get sick as we all know We are MIGHTY when we mask up so let's let the whole world know That together we are strong! Repeat refrain
tune: Solidarity Forever/Battle Hymn of the Republic

title: Uvalde
lyrics:
The last day of school and the children were fine,
just itching to play in the summer sunshine
But then all went dark and the blood ran like wine
And Republicans stand with the killer

His battlefield gun, he took time to load
with hollow-tipped rounds that make bodies explode
And what he was thinking, we never will know
But Republicans stand with the killer

That day in Uvalde, the noise shook the ground
and people all over the earth turned around
For no one recalled a more cowardly sound
As Republicans stood with the killer

Our innocent darlings, our daughters and sons
are prey to the psychos who hunt them with guns
Like fish in a barrel, they’ve nowhere to run
And Republicans stand with the killers

Greg Abbott and Cruz and the whole GOP
would sacrifice children so gun nuts are ”free”
and so they enable the next killing spree
For they shamelessly stand with the killers

We cherish our children, we want them to thrive,
to learn and to grow, to create and to strive
Though most of us stand for protecting young lives,
still Republicans stand for the killers

title: More Dead In USA
lyrics:
Bad people with guns are coming
They kill us because they can
Guns everywhere – almost numbing
Does anyone give a damn?

Gotta get down to it
Shooters are gunning us down
Should have been stopped long ago
What if your own kids get
slaughtered, dead on the ground?
Then will it matter? – or no?

You’re hoping that this blows over
But everyone’s well aware
These killings keep getting closer
Mass killers are everywhere

Don’t try to lie to us
This is not about doors
We know the problem is guns
People are rising up
We can’t take it no more
We gotta fight ‘til we’ve won

Guns multiply, it’s so chilling
It’s worsening every day
More shooters, more guns, more killings
More dead in USA
More dead in USA
More dead in USA
More dead in USA

title: FREEDOM UNDER ASSAULT
lyrics:
They’re intent on killing free-e-doms,
and it’s more than Roe v. Wade
They want state control of women
and they want us all afraid
They assault female autonomy
and it’s more than forcing birth
‘cause they see us as their property
and our lives do not have worth

When they talk about the “right to life,”
they mean fetuses unborn
After birth some babies have no rights
and the mother’s life is scorned
If they cared about life’s ”sanctity”
they’d end massacres in schools,
end the homelessness and poverty -
But instead they’re just plain cruel

We must start a revolution
to reclaim our civil rights
We will stop this persecution
And it’s gonna be a fight
We will not live in the Handmaid’s Tale
We refuse to be abused
We will not be terrorized by males
We’ll be free to live and choose!

title: Bye Bye Hatred
lyrics:
Gender freedom must prevail
for us all, without fail
Bye-bye hatred!

Gender can be changeable
Still we’re all loveable
Bye-bye hatred!

We respect all styles and variations
In this world there’s room for all creation

Be your sexuality
It’s not all binary
Hatred, bye bye!

Straight or gay or trans or bi,
no one shall question why
Bye-bye hatred!

Who we are on the inside
Each of us shall decide
Bye-bye hatred!

We condemn all sex discrimination
queerness is a call for celebration

Marching for equality,
liberty, dignity
Hatred, bye bye!

title: My Country 'Tis of Thee
lyrics:
My country, ‘tis of thee
Where is our liberty,
justice for all?
We used to feel such pride
Now there's a big divide
All reason has been cast aside
We are in a brawl.

Our justice can be found
if we find common ground
We all belong.
Our cause is liberty,
freedom for you and me
Come, join us in a harmony
as we sing this song!

title: Nasty Nukes
lyrics:
We’re gonna get rid of nasty nukes
We will abolish them – we will abolish them
We will abolish them
We’re gonna get rid of nasty nukes
We will abolish them – abolish them for good

We ain’t gonna study war no more
ain’t gonna study war no more
Study war no more!
We ain’t gonna study war no more
ain’t gonna study war no more
Study war no more!

We’re gonna renew diplomacy
We mustn’t escalate — We mustn’t escalate
We must negotiate
We’re gonna renew diplomacy
We mustn’t escalate
We must negotiate

We don’t wanna get the whole world fried
don’t wanna get the whole world fried
no more genocide!
We don’t wanna get the whole world fried
don’t wanna get the whole world fried
No more genocide!

We’re gonna get rid of nasty nukes
We will abolish them — We will abolish them
We will abolish them
We’re gonna get rid of nasty nukes
We will abolish them
Abolish them for good!
key_or_starting_note: Key of G; start note D

title: We Shall Take Our Country Back (from the MAGA fascists)
lyrics:
We shall take our country back
We shall take our country back
Because it’s ours, we reclaim democracy
We shall take it back!

Against the MAGA fascists, we are standing strong
Against the MAGA fascists, we are standing strong
We stand for truth, freedom and democracy
we are standing strong!

We shall take our country back
We shall take our country back
Because it’s ours, we reclaim democracy
We shall take it back!

Insurrection plotters must be sent to jail
Insurrection plotters must be sent to jail
’cause if they’re not, they will do the same again
Lock them all in jail!

Rule of law must be upheld
Rule of law must be upheld
Let’s show respect for the Constitution
It must be upheld

Party of sedition surely has to lose
Party of sedition surely has to lose
They co-conspired to betray democracy
They must be removed!

We shall take our country back
We shall take our country back
Because it’s ours, we reclaim democracy
We shall take it back!
tune: We Shall Not Be Moved / No Nos Moveran

title: America Endangered
lyrics:
This is a recent revision of the song "America For the People" which was written for voting rights and the "For the People Act." It has now been updated to apply to the MAGA attacks on our democracy.

Democracy is under siege:
the freedoms we hold dear
imperiled by Republicans
through lies and hate and fear
America, America,
the right-wing plans are grim
Unite and fight for all our rights!
Together we must win!

They’re racists and misogynists
They foster violence
they’re tearing down our nation, and
it’s getting pretty tense
America, America,
don’t let the haters win!
Unite and fight for all our rights!
Together we must win!

Let’s come together, rally ‘round -
democracy’s at stake!
We need a landslide victory
right now, for freedom’s sake!
America, America,
our healing must begin
Unite and fight for all our rights!
Together we must win!

title: Pissed-Off Grannies and the ERA
lyrics: Pissed-Off Grannies and the ERA We raging grannies are here today To ask you about the ERA. So just listen and help us find out Why we still don’t have it yet: In 1923, Alice Paul did say: “We women don’t have equal rights today.” So, she wrote down an amendment That we call the ERA. But the old men in the Congress Who’d been in charge since the dinosaurs… When they saw it, they said no thanks -- We like it fine this way! So, it sadly sat until the 70’s, When Shirley Chisholm, Gloria Steinem, Bella Abzug, and Betty Friedan Said that we can really win! That starts a movement for equal rights Though critics called it “Women’s Lib” -- And didn’t like it when we burned our bras! But most women wanted in! It was ratified by 36 states -- Despite right-wing Phyllis Schlafly Spreading lies about bathrooms [speak: "sound familiar?"] And doors slamming in our face. We are saying, “Hear the people roar In numbers too big to ignore”! Who’s afraid of woman power? The patriarchy must fall! Don’t be thinking of telling us to wait! It’s already been 100 years to date! It’s now ratified by 38 states. So let’s make it happen now! [Shout: "Equal Rights Amendment Now!!!"]
songwriter: Ellen Canavan, Chris Carlson, and Jade Dell

title: YOU ARE MY SUNSHINE
lyrics:
The other night, Sun, as I lay sleeping
I dreamed our ozone layer was gone
When I awoke, Sun, inspired to action,
I just had to write down this song

You are my sunshine, my only sunshine
You have the power to fuel this place
You leave no poisons, no toxic waste dumps
Just a blush upon my face

Your sister, Wind, too – she’s got some power
and she will help us tirelessly
New Mexico is uniquely suited
For both wind and sun energy

Our human family is waking up now
We’ll change our wasteful, harmful ways
We’ll have a kinder, more peaceful world now
We’ll have healthier, happier days

You are my sunshine, my only sunshine
You have the power to fuel this place
You leave no poisons, no toxic waste dumps
Just a blush upon my face

title: FOR OUR GRANDCHILDREN'S SAKE (anti-nuke)
lyrics:
Our nuclear weapons are sealing our fate
There’s no place to hide,
there’s no place that’s safe
And we know that all life on earth is at stake
So we say NO NUKES!
for our grandchildren’s sake

With hazardous radioactive pollution
for nuclear waste, there is no solution
and LANL keeps failing to clean their mess up
So that’s why we say, STOP making this stuff!

As people are suffering in desperate straits,
you’re building more bombs
and inciting more hate
What kind of a world do you want to create?!
So we say NO NUKES!
for our grandchildren’s sake
Oh, for our grandchildren’s sake!

title: 'CAUSE YOU'RE UNINSURED
lyrics:
Skip the check-ups that you need
Prices are absurd
Take good care of yourself
'cause you're uninsured

Bigger tax cuts for the rich
are certainly preferred
over care of our health,
so we're uninsured

The right-wing plan is this:  - oo - oo
Don’t get sick!  - oo - oo
If you do, DIE QUICK!!  - oo - oo
You can't have health unless you have wealth, so . . .

Don't inhale near other folks
They have germs, I've heard
Take good care of yourself
'cause you're uninsured
date_written_or_updated: When it was written is unknown. Revised by Marcy Matasick in 2018

title: Oh, Lord, Won't You Buy Me an AR-15
lyrics:
Oh Lord, won’t you buy me an AR-15
with hundreds of bullets and a big magazine
You know how I yearn for a killing machine
Oh Lord, won’t you buy me an AR-15

Oh Lord, save the children from history books
and factual knowledge – please don’t let them look
School kids get slaughtered, but it’s better than woke
Oh Lord, save the children from history books

Oh Lord, won’t you buy me a politician
who hates all the lib’rals and likes to offend
It’s ok with me if he rides with the Klan
Oh Lord, won’t you buy me a politician

Oh Lord, save the zygotes, protect them from harm
for each life is precious, until it is born
Sacrifice children to the god of firearms
Oh Lord, save the zygotes, protect them from harm

Oh Lord, won’t you buy me an AR-15
with hundreds of bullets and a big magazine
You know how I yearn for a killing machine
Oh Lord, won’t you buy me an AR

title: Oh Ancient Land Of Palestine
lyrics:
Oh ancient land of Palestine, the tanks are rolling by
The children run as soldiers guns alarm them and make them cry
And in the dark streets shineth the merciless searchlights
The hopes and fears of all the years are smoldering tonight

How noisily, how noisily, the shells fall down like rain
So fear imparts to human hearts despair and crushing pain
For Palestine’s imprisoned behind apartheid walls
While here we sleep, our taxes keep big guns aimed at those walls

With Palestine’s resistance and, Israelis who choose dissent,
we take a stand, and we demand: oppression has got to end!
All people are entitled to basic human rights
And not just some, but everyone!  With Palestine, we unite!
key_or_starting_note: key of C, starting note E

title: Stealing Public Education
lyrics:
Title: Stealing Public Education
Tune: Glory Glory Halleluia (lyrics written by Joyce Riddel and Dorothy Cresswell)

We’re horrified we’re losing hard-won freedoms in our land
For an equal education and the right to understand.
The importance of our history, the struggles yes with race,
The inequities, injustices, that brought us to this place.

It truly is appalling how you’re crossing every line
Making laws that take the rights that we have fought for over time.
We won’t support your slate of hate, ‘gainst gays and trans and blacks
Yes, we have got their backs!

Holy cow we ought to sue ya, Read the riot act right to ya,
As you take away our books, restrict our speech—-white-collar crooks!
Stealing public education from us all!

Your takeover is hostile, and good students leave the state
‘Cause they want to ask their questions and they want to demonstrate
And they want to grow in wisdom and a chance to debate
And not become a puppet of your hateful all-white state!

From K to 12 and on to college, graduate school and more
Interfering with the teachers who already know much more
Than your puppet new appointments taking over our school boards
Threatening teachers and the parents like they’ve never done before!
CHORUS

Heard about school voucher programs that would go to private schools
Leaving public education even poorer, we’re not fools.
So you’re stealing from the public, giving it where there’s excess
Your policies are rotten and you’re flunking every test!

Ron DeSantis and republicans who think you are so smart
But your minds have lost their compass and it’s sad you’ve lost your heart.
We sing to you today because there is a better way
Let teachers teach, so truth can reach our students every day.

title: Are You Woke?
lyrics:
ARE YOU WOKE? tune: William Tell Overture
Central Florida Raging Grannies
(written by Barbara Mars, edits by Dorothy Cresswell)

Are you WOKE? Are you WOKE? Are you WOKE today?
Do you know? Do you know? What we mean to say?
Do you care? Do you care what’s been going on?
Wake up now —-Bring a better dawn!

Be aware of the state of the state today—-
They’re dumbing down our schools!
Tell the jerks though it hurts we will teach the truth,
Our kids will not be fools!

So be WOKE, So be WOKE, So be WOKE today!
Let us all work together, don’t delay!
Stay informed, and speak up, don’t be silent now
And step up cause we need you now!

Be aware of the state of the state today—-
They’re dumbing down our schools!
Tell the jerks though it hurts we will teach the truth,
Our kids will not be fools!

So be Woke, So be Woke, So be Woke today—
Be awake, stay awake what we mean to say.
If we all stay aware of what’s going on
Then together we’ll all be strong!

Hi Ho, speak out—today!!!

title: You Don't Have to Walk a Lonesome Pathway
lyrics: Tune: You Got to Walk that Lonesome Valley Oh community care ... is what we need nowWe've got to care, for everyoneLet's keep an eye out, for one anotherNo one has to walk all by themselves If you're feeling blue...please talk to someoneCuz people can help, you're not aloneyou just might make, a brand new friendshipyou won't have to walk all by yourself An o-old time song, that we heard oftenSaid you have to walk all by yourselfBut the Grannies are here, to say we'll change thatNo one has to walk all by themselves No you don't have to walk a lonesome pathwayYou don't have to walk all by yourselfWe can all reach out, to one anotherWe don't have to walk, all by ourselves
tune: You've Got to Walk that Lonesome Valley

title: Our Grief is Real
lyrics:
The <u>gov</u>ernment’s spending our taxes
On <u>god</u>-awful weapons of war
That are <u>kill</u>ing some other mothers’ children
Left <u>griev</u>ing on some distant shore.

They’re buying up more ammunition,
Missiles and bombers and drones,
Bringing death and destruction to millions,
Destroying their cities and homes.

CHORUS:
     But this is no time to weep and to whine,
     Our grief is real as we spill our tears;
     And though times may seem rough, we’ve seen enough
     Of making war year after year.

They say they believe in democracy
And ‘live and let live’ is their creed;
But they just keep on killing and killing,
Kow-towing to corporate greed.

Our people are barely surviving,
We’re losing our jobs and our homes.
But the war profiteers, they keep thriving,
While defaulting on government loans.

2nd CHORUS:
  But this is no time to weep and to whine,
  There’s plenty of work left for us to do;
  We can cut through their lies, if we organize…
  We are many and they are few!
tune: My Bonnie Lies Over the Ocean

title: Put All the Guns Aside
lyrics: There’s a dark and a troubled side of life In this country that we call the USA We’re outnumbered by guns and under fire And violence it happens every day CHORUS: Put all the guns aside, put all the guns aside Put all the guns aside right now Sweep them up and melt them down, we’ll be safer down in town If we put all the guns aside right now Oh the storm and its fury broke today Crushing hopes that we cherish so dear Another incident that causes us dismay And more of us are living in fear CHORUS Let us greet with a song of hope each day And keep working for what we know to be true Hold the line, get out the vote and be brave Together there’s no stopping what we do CHORUS

title: Children of Gaza
lyrics:
When I think of Gaza’s plight
the children haunt me day and night
All the children who are crying
All the children who are dying
And the things they’ve seen
that no one should have to bear
happening there
So filled with fear, they’re silent

Children should be having fun
Safe place to play, safe place to run
Wholesome food and good, clean water,
Safety for their moms and fathers
They should not be exposed to the violence and gore
that goes with war
The roar of bombs . . . then silence

Still our lawmakers ignore
all the horrors of this war
They don’t hear the children crying
They don’t see the people dying
We’ve got to break through this immoral complacency
Stop tragedy . . .
No, we will not be silent!
