title: Fifty Ways to Save Your Mother (Earth)
lyrics:
“The problem is burning too much fuel” she said to me
“and drilling my hide to death, and cutting down my trees”
She said “Please help me in my struggle just to breathe
There must be 50 ways to save your Mother”
She said, “It’s really not my habit to intrude
But humans are hurting me and you don’t have a clue
So I’ll repeat myself: My survival’s up to you!
There must be 50 ways to save your Mother
50 ways to save your Mother
Just hop on a bike, Mike
Walk if you can, Stan
Divest from those fuels, Jules
Just think about me
Compost your greens, Jean
Buy fewer new clothes, Rose
Plant a new tree, Lee
And let me live free
Re-use the sack, Jack
Say no to meat, Pete
Start eating more plants, Vance
Just think about me
Recycle plastic, Rick
Go solar electric!
Cut the A/C, Stacie
And let me live free

She said, “It grieves you so to cause me so much pain
But there’s a lot that you can do, to help me heal again”
I said, “I appreciate that, and would you please explain
about the 50 ways --?”
She said, “Why don't you go and sleep on it tonight?
And throw on a blanket, turn the heat down just a mite”
And in the morning it was clear that she was right
There must be 50 ways to save our Mother
50 ways to save your Mother
Recycle that can, Dan
Buy second-hand, Fran
Get solar at home, Noam
Just think about me
Hop on the bus, Gus
Stay off of that plane, Wayne!
Ride on the train, Jane
And let me live free
Grow your own food, Jude
Shorten your shower, Howard
Re-use and reduce, Bruce
Just think about me
Trade in your Hummer, Summer
Try using less gas, Cass
Shop locally, Dee
And let me live free
tune: Fifty Ways to Leave Your Lover

title: You're No Good, SCOTUS
lyrics:
Sittin’ pretty, in your black gowns
Sittin’ pretty like serious clowns
With every case you hear you twist
the Constitution up in your fists
 You’re no good, you’re no good, you’re no good
 SCOTUS, you're no good
 I'm gonna say it again
 You’re no good, you’re no good, you’re no good
 SCOTUS, you're no good
Trump sent his mob to Capitol Hill
so to stage a coup and to maim and to kill
So some states kicked the traitor off their slate
But SCOTUS said, let the traitor skate!
 You’re no good, [etc.]
You get no pass for Bush v. Gore
President Al Gore wouldn’t start a damn war
Our carbon footprint would be size three
Wolves and whales would be wild and free
 You’re no good, [etc.]
DC v Heller, Two thousand eight,
a Pandora’s box of bullets and hate
The 2nd Amendment never said what you said!
How many people have to wind up dead?
 You’re no good, [etc.]
Corruption reigns, because of you
Citizens United was a cold-blooded coup
you opened the floodgates for bribery
Corporations broke democracy
 You’re no good, [etc.]

title: Gotta Shut You Down LANL (Los Alamos National Lab)
lyrics:
LANL is building more atom bombs
gonna lead to annihilation
The people say NO! ’cause the people know
that the bombs are an abomination
It's against the law; United Nations law;
nukes have been outlawed; they are against the law
They poison our water, poison the air
with plutonium radiation
“Safety” they vowed, but they lied, so now
we’re demanding a complete cessation
Cease and desist!
You don't know who you’re harming
Cease and desist!
Don’t have a right to endanger us
Goodbye to LANL, bane of the living!
Gotta shut you down or you'll blow up the whole world
Gotta shut you down or you'll blow up the whole world
Whoa, now our senators, both, and our governor, too
ought to know that they must protect us
Forget the federal bucks, 'cause plutonium sucks,
and remember that our lives are precious
Cease and desist!
You don't know who you’re harming
Cease and desist!
Don’t have a right to endanger us
Goodbye to LANL, bane of the living!
Gotta shut you down or you'll blow up the whole world
Gotta shut you down or you'll blow up the whole world
Gotta shut you down or you'll blow up the whole world
tune: Me & Julio Down By the Schoolyard

title: Over There (Gaza)
lyrics: Over there!  Over there!Don’t you dare kill those kids over there!Babies pure with virtueThey never hurt youYou must not harm them over there! So, beware!   Yes, beware!Listen up!  Read our lips!  Say a prayer'cause we’re raging!Yes, really raging!      And we WON’T! SHUT! UP!‘Til it’s over over there!

title: Say Their Names
lyrics:
Ten years a<u>go</u>, young Michael Brown,
Eighteen years <u>old</u> when they shot him down.
Then Corey <u>Jones</u>, and young Sean Bell,
And Sandra <u>Bland</u>, we remember well....

Tamir <u>Rice</u> was just a boy,
Aiyana <u>Jone</u>s, Rekia Boyd,
Yvette <u>Smith</u>, and Maya Hall,
And Kendra <u>James</u>, we remember all.

We say their <u>names</u> and cry in pain,
To see it <u>hap</u>pen once again.
Now Sonya <u>Mass</u>ey, forever stilled
By cops with <u>guns</u> feelin’ free to kill.

She called for <u>help</u> but no help came,
Shot dead by <u>cops</u> who have no shame.
And tho’ our <u>hair</u> has now turned gray
We sing for <u>those</u> we’ve lost today.

’Tho beaten, <u>jailed</u>, and hosed and gassed,
We won’t go <u>back</u> to the Jim Crow past.
So on we <u>struggle</u>, march and sing:
“Let justice <u>reign</u>; let freedom ring.”

title: Aysenur Never Made it Home
lyrics: Aysenur, never made it home IOF* shot HER in the head No! We will not let this go…. RE-cent Graduate Only went to protect No we will not let this go… Aysenur, never posed a threat She was standing calmly by No we will not let this go TOO many lives are lost This injustice must not stand We demand investigation…. (shout) NOW! *Israeli Offense Forces substitute IDF as option

title: RAISE YOUR VOICE FOR PALESTINE
lyrics: RAISE YOUR VOICE Listen with heart, you’ll hear their voices callingfrom Palestine, where terror reigns supremevoices of sorrow, grief and desperationThey call to us: to our humanitySo raise your voice to protest inhumanity!And raise your voice for thousands who’ve been slainTogether we must change the course of historyKeep singing loud and proud ’til freedom is attained We sing for children – orphaned, scared and hungryWe sing for women – struggling to be freeWe sing for men who want to save their familiesYes, these are human beings like you and meSo raise your voice with power for the powerless!We call for peace, from river to the seaTogether we will honor every human lifeKeep singing loud and proud ’til Palestine is free Don’t call us anti-Semites when we stand for lifeWe’re anti-killing; we’re not anti-JewDon’t claim it’s self-defense when it is genocideDon’t try to silence us for speaking truthWe raise our voice for freedom and for libertyYou’ll never shut us up – so hear our prayerTogether we demand that Palestine be freeWe’ll keep on singing ’til you end this reign of terror!

title: Bring Back My Body
lyrics: Bring Back My Body to Me! (tune: My Bonnie Lies Over the Ocean) When politics run our court system And Women’s Rights become our wrong, Then we say you can’t own our bodies And that’s why we’re singing this song: Bring back, bring back, oh bring back my body to me, to me! Bring back, bring back, oh bring back my body to me, to me! Religions reach different conclusions: Does breath give life or does the womb? So why should one answer be law now With many folks singing this tune: (Refrain)
tune: My Bonnie Lies Over the Ocean

title: It's a Sin to Tell the Big Lie
lyrics: It’s a Sin to Tell the Big Lie Spoken introduction: At this time, when 47 still won’t admit he lost in 2020, and women are being told they no longer have a say about some very important decisions, we call upon Melania and Ivanka to speak up, and say to 47: It wasn’t true when you said you won, dear. It’s a sin to tell a lie. Multiple laws have been broken just because those words were spoken. Don’t you see all the pain you’re causing just because you won’t concede? For you lost, my dear, fair and square my dear! And it’s a sin to tell a lie!
tune: It's a Sin to Tell a Lie

title: Make America Kind Again
lyrics:
Make America kind again!  Save democracy! Teach our children truthfully:  The truth will set us free!

Let us be more welcoming!  Let us be more kind!

For out of many we are one  With loving ties that bind!

 We can save our wondrous world   From ignorance and greed,  If all our hearts and hands unite  To serve each other’s need.

Let us be more welcoming!  Let us be more kind!

For out of many we are one  With loving ties that bind!

title: You Can't Stomp on Me (Inauguration Protest)
lyrics: CHORUS: You can’t stomp, you can’t stomp, you can’t stomp on me We still have rights and we will fight ’til everyone is free OH You can’t stomp, you can’t stomp, you can’t stomp on me We still have rights and we will fight for human dignity We have the right to speak and demonstrate it’s true And we will not be stopped… by MAGA thugs like you! We won’t apologize, or take back what we say We’ll speak our minds, we won’t be kind… we’re rising up today! [chorus] So-called United States, has room enough for all Of every shade and hue, all people short and tall We’ll keep on speaking out, for civil rights &peace And we will not be stomped upon! All fascists we’ll defeat

title: Things That Go Trump In the Night
lyrics: Predators, kleptocrats looting our nationvicious attacks on our very foundationFascistic gangsters assaulting our rights   These are some thingsthat go Trump in the night   Trashing due process and habeas corpusflouting all laws as if they have no purposeWhat kind of criminal thinks this is right?These are some thingsthat go Trump in the night   He calls nations “shit hole countries”if they’re not all whiteOh, he is an expert on shit holes, alright:The things that go Trump at night! One-seventy billion for mass deportationsThree thousand daily: it’s terrorizationNeighbors are vanishing, friends disappearFamilies torn apart, living in fear    Thugs roam our streets in their gaiters & camohunting the innocent, armed and with ammo Raids in the shadows, they come for the meek Who are these goons? Trump’s Secret Police!   We must stand up! We must speak out!We’ll defend our rights!For justice and liberty, we have to fightthe things that go Trump at night!

title: When Civil Rights Belong To All
lyrics: WHEN CIVIL RIGHTS BELONG TO ALL         Tune : When the Saints Go Marching In  When civil rights belong to allWhen civil rights belong to allWe will make our nation betterWhen civil rights belong to all  Now women’s rights are human rightsand racial rights are human rightsAll religions, ages, and genders:for them all we’re going to fight Our immigrants and refugees:  we’ve got to listen to their pleas They have come here seeking refuge  Let us treat them all kindly  Treat everyone with dignityand let’s get free from bigotryLet us heal all forms of divisionLet’s have real equality  Equality means everyoneIt means we leave behind no oneWe will end all forms of injusticeDignity for everyone!  When we make peace with Mother Earthand when we stop abusing hershe’ll repay us with abundance:And we must allow re-birth   When we make peace with everyoneand when we ban all bombs and gunswe will be the greatest winners’cause it’s peace we will have won  In common good we must investThe good of all is what we stressWe all win, and nobody losesWe’re all blessed when all are blessed  When every vote counts equally,And MAGA rule is historywe’ll have free and fair electionsWe’ll restore democracy
tune: When the Saints Go Marching In

title: House the Poor
lyrics:
HOUSE THE POOR
 Tune: I Walk the Line, Johnny Cash

With wages low and ever rising rents,
folks live in cars, or hunker down in tents
This is a crisis, and it’s plain to see:
low income homes are what we need

In such a wealthy nation, don’t you think
we’d house the homeless, quick as you can wink?
Stop spending trillions building bombs for war
Let’s build new hous-ing for the poor

When tons of money pour into our state,
why are so many folks in dire straights?
In nuclear bombs, our state is number one
In poverty, we’re bottom rung

New Mexico, let’s solve it! Let’s get down
get down to housing all the poor in town
Let’s do it now – on this we must agree:
Don’t fight the poor – fight poverty
Don’t fight the poor – fight poverty

title: Do Lord
lyrics:
Do Lord, oh do Lord, oh do remember me
I fell on some hard times, that I could not foresee
I have lost my home and now I'm living on the street
Do remember me

When I cannot find a meal, do remember me
When the cops destroy my camp, forcing me to flee
When there’s no place left to go, do remember me
Do remember me

Do Lord, tell the city to curb Airbnb's
Make more long-term rentals to meet the local needs
We could use some rent control, or how about rent freeze?
Do remember me

Do Lord, oh do Lord, oh do remember me
When I see no hope in this perverse economy
Trillions go to making bombs, but millions go hungry
Do remember me

Do Lord, tell Congress to tax the well-to-do
Tell them tax the profits of corporations, too
Tell them build a safety net, so folks like me aren’t screwed
Do remember me

I've got a home in glory land – but I can’t wait that long
I need a home in this here land, a place where I belong
Life shouldn’t have to be this hard – the system is all wrong
Do remember me!

title: Without a Home
lyrics: Tucked into an alley, sometimes I live in a boxOr sleep in the bushes down by the railroad trackConsider it lucky that I have two pairs of socks    Couple of smokes, candy bars in my pack           [Chorus:]  Oh, I’ve seen heat and I’ve seen rainI’ve seen bitter cold that I thought would never endI’ve seen lonely times when I could not find a friendBut I always know I’ll get on my feet again           I worked as a waitress, don’t you know, back in the dayThen came the babies, and all the bills to payTheir daddy walked out, hardly a word to sayThat’s when the landlord told us we couldn’t stay  [Chorus:]  Oh, I’ve seen heat and I’ve seen rain . . .  My children were taken, taken right out of my armsFailed as a mother, wish I had more to giveI pray for them daily,Lord won’t you keep them from harmSometimes I’ve wondered, why do I choose to live [Chorus:]   Oh, I’ve seen heat and I’ve seen rain . . .  If you should see me roaming the streets all aloneknow it ain’t easy, living without a home My body’s aching and I’m tired to the boneSure wish I had a place to call my own  [Chorus:]   Oh, I’ve seen heat and I’ve seen rainI’ve seen bitter cold that I thought would never endI’ve seen lonely times when I could not find a friendBut I always know I’ll get on my feet again I always know I’ll get on my feet againI always know I’ll get on my feet . . . again

title: Housing Rights
lyrics:
HOUSING RIGHTS
Tune: When the Saints Go Marching In

The right to housing is a right
just like our other human rights:
right to life, religion & freedom
for them all, we’ve got to fight

Our housing market makes no sense
The average wage can’t pay these rents
Greedy landlords must be governed
To dispossess is violence

Let’s tackle poverty and debt
Let’s weave a stronger safety net
We must lend a helping hand to
those who do not have assets

The folks who have no property
deserve respect and dignity
Folks with wealth are not more worthy
All deserve equality!

Equality means everyone
It means we leave behind no one
We must end all forms of injustice
by including everyone

In common good we must invest
The good of all is what we stress
We all win when nobody loses
We’re all blessed when all are blessed
tune: When the Saints Go Marching In

title: Project 2025
lyrics: Mine eyes have seen the coming of American royalty Anointed by the Court Supreme with all immunity To prevent a presidential king, it’s up to you and me If Democracy goes marching on CHORUS: Power lust is never satisfied Billionaires, they want to rule our lives Pay low wages and jack up our living costs Enough! Demand your rights! I've seen warnings written in a hundred news reports Project twenty twenty five our freedoms will abort With a tyrant on Day One our rights will be under assault Will a king be president? I’ve read a fiery manual, writ in angry tones of zeal By those who want the freedom to make their shady deals Their endless itch for power will force us all to kneel At the altar of gold and greed CHORUS: Power lust is never satisfied Billionaires, they want to rule our lives Pay low wages and jack up our living costs Enough! Demand your rights! Destroy a hundred years of protective regulation It'll only take a day or so of signing proclamations Clean air and water, living wages, public education Gone by the stroke of a pen The king fires civil servants, fifty thousand or more Hires his politicos, who loyalty have sworn Obey the king, right or wrong, legalities ignored They serve in submission CHORUS: Power lust is never satisfied Billionaires, they want to rule our lives Pay low wages and jack up our living costs Enough! Demand your rights Abortion, contraception, in vitro fertilization The right to choose belongs to us, so please pay close attention No woman's life should be at risk from faulty legislation We won't breed like rabbits! Project twenty twenty five fills nine hundred pages Hurts the young, the old, the disabled, and people of all ages We must rise up and take a stand, and verbalize our rages! Our freedom depends on us CHORUS: Power lust is never satisfied Billionaires, they want to rule our lives Pay low wages and jack up our living costs Enough! Demand your rights! (slow): Enough! Demand your rights!

title: Oh, Tillis, Do Your Job! (or insert Congress or other politician's name) )
lyrics: Oh Tillis please, just do your job Oh Tillis please, just do your job Oh how I want to be in that number When you finally do your job! You say you will, and then you don’t You say you will, and then you don’t Vote for what the people are wanting You say you will and then you don’t You work for us, that's how it works You work for us, that's how it works Or at least, that's how it’s supposed to You work for us, that’s how it works Will you stand up, to tyranny Will you stand up, to tyranny When will you fight Trump’s cruel agenda Will you stand up, to tyranny Where are you now, where could you be? Where are you now, where could you be? Are you hiding at home ‘cause you’re chicken? We need you now, where could you be? Oh Tillis please, just do your job Oh Tillis please, just do your job Oh how I want to be in that number When you finally do your job! Oh how I want to be in that number When you finally grow a spi-i-ine!
tune: When The Saints Go Marching In

title: Mr. Tangerine Man
lyrics:
Hey, Mr. Tangerine Man, stay away from me
You are creepy, and you are no good for anything
Hey, Mr. Tangerine Man, stay away from me
You’re a traitor to our nation ’cause you act like a king

You’re persecuting innocents, distracting from your crimes
when you should be doing time
Then viciously you slime
the officials who respect the Constitution
And when you get court orders, you blow them off, defy –
and smear the judge with lies:
You deflect, attack, deny and cause confusion

Hey, Mr. Tangerine Man, stay away from me
You are creepy, and you are no good for anything
Hey, Mr. Tangerine Man, stay away from me
You’re a traitor to our nation ’cause you act like a king

You love that ethnic cleansing and support a genocide
yes, you’re even taking pride
in your plans to build resorts upon the ruins
A textbook case of psychopathy, you lack empathy
and you cannot even see
how offensive you can be
’cause to you there’s only pawns, there are no humans

Hey, Mr. Tangerine Man, stay away from me
You are creepy, and you are no good for anything
Hey, Mr. Tangerine Man, stay away from me
You’re a traitor to our nation ’cause you act like a king

You seem to think the rules we follow don’t apply to you
Nothing matters but your view
we should accept your lies as true
And the world is only here to serve your cravings

And women are not people in your eyes, we’re only dolls
We should have no rights at all
Who are we to claim assault? we’re only playthings

Hey, Mr. Tangerine Man, stay away from me
You are creepy, and you are no good for anything
Hey, Mr. Tangerine Man, stay away from me
You’re a traitor to our nation ’cause you act like a king

title: Battle Hymn of the Donald
lyrics: Mine eyes have seen the crime-ingand the sliming of the TrumpHe lost sight of all decency,his head is up his rumpAnd with his team of crooks and liars,sycophants and chumpsThe fraud is marching on  His lawyers are on speed dialand they’re working overtimeto fight off all the lawsuitsand the scandals and the crimeHe tries to shake off Epsteinbut he can’t shake off the slimeThe cover-ups pile on  Lordy! Lordy! How he'll screw ya!With his lies he’ll try to fool yaBut, don’t ever let him rule ya!No, we will not back down! Mine ears have heard the smearingand the slander from the rightdefiling truth and honestyand substituting spiteinventing Trumped-up chargesnabbing people day and nightThe hate is marching on  I’ve seen them cut the taxesfor the richest billionairesWhile stealing from the working classand causing great despairAnd now polluters have their waywith all our land and airTheir wreckage will live on  Lordy! Lordy! How they screw ya!With their lies they try to fool yaBut, don’t ever let ’em rule ya!No, we will not back down!

title: Angry People
lyrics: ANGRY PEOPLE     Tune: Lonely People by America   This is for all the angry peoplewatching the tyranny beginDon’t give up, we got tomarch in the streets togetherand keep on fighting ’til we win   This is for all the worried peoplewatching the news and feeling stunnedDon’t give up until we’ve taken our country backwith equal rights for everyone   We The People say:  We are here to stayand this movement grows every day   This is for all the migrant peopleliving in fear from day to dayDon’t give up, because youhave the support of manywho don’t want you to go away   We The People say:  We are here to stayand this movement grows every day   This is for all the angry peopleseeing democracy done-inDon’t give up until we’ve taken our country backNo, don’t give up until we’vetaken our country backkeep on fighting ’til we win

title: Stop the Coup
lyrics:
There’s something happening here
What it is, is perfectly clear
There’s a coup going down in DC
taking a chainsaw to everything we believe
It’s time to STOP! Hey! Stop the coup!
Everybody speak out bold and true!

Battle lines being drawn
They think they’re right
but we know they are wrong
The Constitution reads clear:
Saying we the people
don’t have kings ’round here

It’s time to STOP! Hey! Stop the coup!
Everybody speak out bold and true

Put your boots upon your feet
Join thousands marching in the street
Singing songs and carrying signs
’cause our liberty is on the firing line

It’s time to STOP! Hey! Stop the coup!
Everybody speak out bold and true

STOP! Hey! Stop the coup!
Everybody speak out bold and true

STOP! Hey! Stop the coup!
Everybody speak out bold and true
STOP!

title: The Climate It Is A-Changing
lyrics:
Come gather ‘round people, we want you to hear
‘bout threats to the earth,
they are something to fear
the world is on fire — Armageddon is near
This is urgent – no time for debating!
Our beautiful planet is dying, it’s clear
for the climate it is a-changing

Come liars, deniers who call it a hoax
Who pretend these disasters are nothing but jokesWhen your children get asthma
and grandmother chokes
even Fox might admit they were faking
When the air that we breathe
is like three packs of smokes
then the climate, it is a-changing

The glaciers are melting, the forests will burn
and the great wheel of karma will finally turn
And the powerful now will later be spurned
’Cause it’s science and truth the world’s craving
Don’t say it’s too late to finally learn
that the climate, it is a-changing

Now Trump is reversing the progress we’ve made
giving Zeldin the job to destroy EPA
He loves his polluters, won’t stand in their way
But the people are angry – we’re raging
“Hands off! our environment!” that’s what we say
for the climate it is a-changing

We’ve got to change course immediately
with massive investments in clean energy
and lots of green jobs, for our economy
because life on earth is worth saving
Get clean off of carbon and let the earth breathe
for the climate, it is a cha -a-anging

title: 65.000 Votes
lyrics: We played by the rules and we voted, But now we are royally pissed, Because some guy named Jefferson Griffin Has put our names down on his list. He thought he could rig his election By concocting some idiot scheme Disenfranchising thousands of voters By changing the rules in midstream. CHORUS #1: But you know, and we know Democracy doesn’t work that way. You can’t just throw out sixty-five thousand votes And that’s why we’re raging today. Why would anyone claim all those voters Did something unlawful or wrong, When they’ve all had the right to be counted Long before he came along? There’s only one clear explanation, And we see it as plain as can be, He’s part of the Project called two-oh-two-five To take down our de-moc-racy, CHORUS #2: But you know, and we know That Allison Riggs won fair and square. You can’t just throw out sixty-five thousand votes So you fascists had better beware! He’s a sore loser, Jefferson Griffin, And we see through his tricks and his lies. But we still have a Constitution And we’ll protect it with all of our lives. REPEAT CHORUS #1
tune: My Bonnie Lies Over the Ocean

title: Chainsaw
lyrics: Chainsawby Janet Jordan for the Raging Grannies of Olympia, Washington US To the tune Valparaiso In a Rowboat words & music by Zeke Hoskin & copyrighted Used by permission Chorus Chainsaw! Chainsaw! They’re taking it down! They’re taking it down. Because they hate the gummint They are taking it to the ground. And there’s never been a program To survive a second round. They’re taking down the gummint with a chainsaw. We used to aid small countries that were being left behind To help them to be strong and be our partners and allies. But Elon thinks that’s crap, they aren’t our friends, and we aren’t theirs So we’ve taken back our dough and left them no-wheres. Chorus Oh the climate’s in a crisis, it’s a real emergency But the leaders urge it onward with a Trump insurgency. No use voting for the climate, cause your voting rights are gone. The only ones with votes are Trump and E-lon. Chorus And if the program’s popular, they can’t remove it quite. They will fire the ones who run it so it strangles in the night. Veterans care and healthcare and social security Every one will perish in obscurity. Chorus The department of education’s set to vanish from the scene Cause who needs education, just to be a human bean. The FBI will disappear, before it investigates The many crimes of Donald and his playmates. Chorus

title: USA Problem
lyrics: USA you have got a problem, Your orange blob’s way out of line! Constantly whining, yuge bigly lying! You’ve got to stop the rot this time! We know a fascist when we see one! And yours is out there in plain sight! Puppet of Putin, That’s why we’re booin’ And if we must we’ll turn and fight! Our Sovereign Nation will not be yours, and if you try it, we’ll kick you out the door! Oooh…. Your Mango Mussolini’s frightning Far right dictatorship’s your plight! You’ve an amendment, To stop this pretendent, And we’ve got elbows up, gloves ready to be dropped, And if we must we’ll clear the bench and fight!
tune: I'm Getting Married in the Morning

title: Trans Rights
lyrics:
Raging Grannies know assigning gender may not seem a lot.
But we recognize that gender can have many different slots.

Attacks on care for the trans youths have simply got to stop!
Trans rights are human rights.



CHORUS:
No more insults, no more slander!
No more right-wing propaganda!
Kid’s bodies are their own, and they must see that they belong.

Trans rights are human rights.



We know that kids are NOT allowed to have the surgery.

And she’s wrong to say the meds have no reversibility!

Our Premier is lying just to stoke her base you see.

Trans rights are human rights!



CHORUS

No more insults, no more slander!
No more right-wing propaganda!
Kid’s bodies are their own, and they must see that they belong.

Trans rights are human rights.

Bigots say that people’s plumbing ought to match their face.

Our government is pandering to its far-right wing base.

We cannot let trans children lose their right to a safe place.
Trans rights are human rights.



CHORUS

No more insults, no more slander!
No more right-wing propaganda!
Kid’s bodies are their own, and they must see that they belong.

Trans rights are human rights.



Our premier said sex is meant for us to procreate.

Showing why we need to separate the Church from State,

Grannies say be who you are there is no place for hate!

Trans rights are human rights!



CHORUS

No more insults, no more slander!
No more right-wing propaganda!
Kid’s bodies are their own, and they must see that they belong.

Trans rights are human rights.
songwriter: WWOW and updated by Rebecca Brown

title: Our Constitution
lyrics: [This song was re-written in the Spring of 2025 for a rally of students and faculty protesting the suppression of dissent and Academic Freedom on US college and university campuses.] We’re here to mourn the Constitution, ’Cause we’re not usin’ it no more! Our liberties have all been swept aside Now that we’ve got a new em-per-or. Our freedoms are quickly disappearing, Our Civil Rights about to fall, But we won’t go down without a fight. Our rights are worth defending... So, we’re gonna show them we stand tall! We treasure our Academic Freedoms, The right to protest as we please; The right to think and speak and have no fear Of ICE or the campus police; The right of our faculty to teach us A hist'ry that isn’t full of lies. We won’t be silent, won’t shut up, We’ll sing out for our freedoms – Yes, we’re gonna show them we stand tall! No more immigrant abductions, Mahmoud Khalil must be set free! No more banning books or censorship, And no more fired faculty! It’s our patriotic duty To dissent when our government is wrong. So, we won’t let them trash our rights Or trample on our freedoms – We’re gonna show them we stand tall! Yes, we’re in it to win it one and all!

title: Happy Mothers Day
lyrics: [This is an updated version of a song I posted in 2017. Mothers Day is here again, but there's still no end to the killing, and too many mothers are mourning for their children....] Here’s a song for all the mothers, And their sisters and their brothers, Aunts and uncles, all the others: Happy Mother’s Day! Mothers should not raise their sons To play with war toys or with guns. Let’s stop the killing, everyone! Happy Mother’s Day! Mothers Day’s a day of peace, A day to say that wars must cease, For love and kindness to increase (so) Happy Mother’s Day! One trillion, two trillion, three trillion dollars, Wasted on war if we don’t holler: “You can go but we won’t follow!” Happy Mother’s Day! As mothers we must show the way, So let us pledge on Mother’s day: Make ev’ry child safe today (for a) Happy Mother’s Day!

title: NO BOUNDS OF MERCY
lyrics:
Hello Putin, my old friend
I’m here alone with you again
Ukraine is hoping we’ll talk of peace
We only want to make our spoils increase
Let Ukrainians see the writing on the wall:
We’ll take it all
Within no bounds of mercy

Netanyahu, love you too
Corrupt as me and just as shrewd
Eye for eye is simply not enough
You’ll kill them all and clean the whole place up
What oppressor has a better card to hold?
So be bold
You have no bounds of mercy

At my swearing in, I saw
Ten million people, maybe more
People dealing and bargaining
People grifting and hustling
People giving bucks in order to buy power:
My finest hour
Within no bounds of mercy

Fools, said I, the coup is on
With your blessing, going strong
Hear my words and accept my lies
Never question – only justify
And those who dare disagree with what they hear,
will disappear
Beyond the bounds of mercy

And the people bowed and prayed
to the golden god I made
They are begging for plutocracy
to replace their dumb democracy
Now, mine is the power and the glory forevermore
from shore to shore
I have no bounds of mercy

title: We Shall Not Be Moved (Immigrants version)
lyrics:
No, no, no nos moveran!
no, no no nos moverán
Como un árbol firme junto al rio
No nos moverán

We shall take our country back!
We shall take our country back!
Because it’s ours, we reclaim democracy!
We shall take it back!

Against the Trump abuses, we are standing strong!
Against the Trump abuses, we are standing strong!
This president causes death and suffering
Stop the cruelty!

We shall stand for human rights!
We shall stand for human rights!
For dignity, liberty, humanity
Stop the cruelty!

Racist deportations, & nazi policies
hunting down the people, acting lawlessly
We must defer to our constitution
Stop the cruelty!

We shall stand for human rights!
We shall stand for human rights!
For dignity, liberty, humanity
Stop the cruelty!

Against the MAGA fascists, we are standing strong!
Against the MAGA fascists, we are standing strong!
We stand for truth, freedom and democracy
We are standing strong!

We shall take our country back!
We shall take our country back!
Because it’s ours, we reclaim democracy!
We shall take it back!

No, no, no nos moveran!
no, no no nos moverán
Como un árbol firme junto al rio
No nos moverán

title: Cry For Gaza
lyrics:
Cry for the children of Gaza
The blue skies rain terror on you
There is no refuge
nowhere to run to
Your parents slaughtered
right there beside you

Cry for the mothers of Gaza
We hope you’ll someday forgive us
for our tax dollars
sending the missiles
that kill your children
and burn your cities

Cry for the fathers of Gaza,
defending your ancient homelands
Your homes demolished,
your children starving
And still you struggle
to keep your birthright

One day the world will awaken
and call for your liberation
Justice for those who
gain from your suffering
You’ll live and flourish
in your free nation

title: Nuclear Wasteland State
lyrics:
Trucks going by every day
risking the lives of the folks on the way
hauling tons and tons of plutonium
three hundred and fifty miles
Cargo of nuclear waste,
nuclear waste that can blow us away
and they keep on transporting more of it
for hundreds of miles – all likely to be defiled

WIPP was just a “pilot” program
It was never to be more
It was limited and short-term
It would close in ’24
Now they’re planning big expansion
with a deadlier-type waste
The potential for disaster
is expanding, too, apace

Everybody’s life at risk,
even people miles away
Radiation poisoning –
Will it kill us all someday?

Valentine Day was the day
Ten years ago radiation did blow
in the toxic waste in the underground –
a stupid mistake, they say
How many stupid mistakes?
How many ways do they threaten our lives?
And we still don’t have any guarantees
their stupid mistakes won’t happen again someday

Don’t make us a wasteland
No, no, don’t make us a wasteland
No, no, no, no, don’t make us a
nuclear wasteland, nuclear wasteland state

title: Battle Hymn for Voting Rights
lyrics:
Our grandmas fought to get the vote a hundred years ago
but folks of color had to keep on fighting even more
Today we fight an evil push to take our rights away
Not one step back! No way!

They want to take us back to when the rich men ruled the land,
when women, blacks & poor folk from the voting booth were banned
But this is our democracy, and this is our demand:
Not one step back! No way!

Voting’s how we make our choices
Voting’s how we raise our voices
Vote suppression is their ploy – yet:
Not one step back! No way!

They gerrymander us right off the map – it’s how they play
They kick us off the rolls if we just look a certain way
They want to kill democracy, and that is why we say:
Not one step back! No way!

We’ve got to join together, brown and yellow, black and white,
progressives and the union folks, and fight with all our might
to show the fascist wannabes they cannot take our rights!
Not one step back! No way!

Voting’s how we make our choices
Voting’s how we raise our voices
Vote suppression is their ploy, yet –
Not one step back! NO WAY!

title: No King For Our Country
lyrics:
Oval Office with golden statues
And a selfie of yourself as pope
Plan a party for your birthday
With a military parade

Keep pretending you are Royalty
And ignore the Constituuuu-tion
Cater only to the billionaires
Who worship your name

But no king is in our future
We refused that so long ago
George Washington declined it
Because he was in the know

This new nation had no need for
A pompous little so-and-so
No king was ever wanted
And that has not ever changed

We don’t want a pathological
E-e-go-o-maniac
Hurling edict after edict
That unravels all we love

While pretending he is Royal
And bribing elected delegates
Who are hungry for power
And want in the game

But this isn’t a chess game
George Washington knew this
So did Adams and Jefferson
Who are rolling in their graves

Calling out to all Americans
Don’t give away this country
Cancel out this wannabe King
And send him on his way

title: Our Constitution Revised for No Kings Day 2025
lyrics: We’re here to mourn the Constitution, ’Cause we’re not usin’ it no more! Our liberties are being swept aside Now that we’ve got a new em-per-or. Our freedoms are quickly disappearing, Our Civil Rights about to fall, But we won’t go down without a fight. Our rights are worth defending… So, we’re gonna show them we stand tall! We treasure the good-old First Amendment; It's part of the American dream; The right to think and speak and have no fear Of ICE or the current regime; The right of teachers all to teach us A hist’ry that isn’t full of lies. We won’t be silent, won’t shut up, We’ll sing out for our freedoms… Yes, we’re gonna show them we stand tall! No more immigrant abductions; All wrongly deported must be freed! No more banning books or censorship; We won’t bow to tyrants on our knees! It’s still our right and it’s our duty To dissent when our government is wrong. So, we won’t let them trash our rights Or trample on our freedoms… We’re gonna show them we stand tall! Yes, we’re in it to win it one and all!

title: Kill the Reconciliation Bill NOW!
lyrics:
The Reconcil-i-a-tion bill...
must be vot-ed down!
It gives e-ven more pow-er...
to the e-vil clown!
It lets him re-voke... non-pro-fit stat-us
for the pro-grams... that be-ne-fit us:
re-productive rights, ref-u-gees, cli-mate change and ev-en "Save the Bees".
Call your Sen-a-tor right now!

lyrics:
The Reconcil-i-a-tion bill...
must be vot-ed down!

to the e-vil clown!

for the pro-grams... that be-ne-fit us:

title: No King And I
lyrics:
We protest [draw out the 1st two syllables – 3 count pause]
As we stand here together
No king here

We protest [3 count pause]
We’re in danger ? dictator
Could appear

We protest [3 count pause]
We all shout freedom’s call
We won’t relent [tone stays even]

We will stand here united
With our arms around each other
We will fight for our rights
One and all [tone goes up]

On the clear understanding
That this kind of thing can happen

We protest
We protest
We protest
tune: Shall We Dance? - From the King and I

title: TACO HELL
lyrics:
Ev'ryone's heard of "Taco Bell".
Now there's somethin' new.
It's the new meme "TACO HELL"
for what Trump's puttin' us through!

With a flippin' tariff here and a floppin' tariff there!
Start a tariff... End a tariff... Change the tariffs ev'rywhere!
"T" "A" "C" "O" when spelled out... means Trump Al-ways Chickens Out!

With all this talk a-bout new memes
we have been in-spired:
"T" "A" "R" "I" "F" "F" means
Trump's Ass Really Is Fine'lly Fired!

So, let's work our own asses off...
a big strike here... a boycott there...

 a pro-longed nash-on-al gen-ral strike ev'-ry-where!
'Cause that is what it's gonna' take to get Trump's fat ass
out!

title: Who's Gonna' Save Democracy?
lyrics:
Who's gonna' save democracy
from this billionaire lun-a-cy?
Some think the Democratic Party can be
made progressive, but that's hard to see
since the court ruled its rich leadershit
can do whatever they see fit!

Because of its private ownership
there's no law that can force it
to o-bey the Party's own rules
or keep them from playin' us for fools!
We real-ly hate to burst your bubble
but both major parties ARE... the trouble!

And Trump's likely to sus-pend our elections,
but if he doesn't, there's the GOP's selections
of voters to cross off the voting rosters
which is somethin' that clearly fosters
e-lections that will guar-an-tee
a-nother win for the GOP!

So, who's gonna' save democracy
from this billionaire lun-a-cy?
Look a-round you, and you will see
the an-swer to that is YOU and ME!!!...
By joining forces we become a HUGE WE!!!
AND TOGETHER IN THE STREETS WE WILL SAVE DEMOCRACY!!!

A GENERAL STRIKE AND BOYCOTT OF ALL MEGA-CORPORATIONS NOW!!!

title: To Those Who Would Be Kings
lyrics: Based on an essay tentatively attributed to Thom Hartmann Were you mad when folks who voted couldn’t get their votes to count? Are you troubled that the rich get all the tax breaks? When ICE kidnaps college students and tears parents from their kids? No, you’re just mad ‘cause a sick kid might get health care. Are you angry that our taxes go to fund illegal wars? Are you troubled by the genocide in Gaza? Do you get mad when we use torture, not due process like we oughta? No, you’re just mad ‘cause a sick kid might get health care. Are you mad they’re wasting millions on a stupid tank parade While our service workers can’t get living wages? Did you protest, did you shout, when all the fat cats got bailed out? No, you’re just mad ‘cause a sick kid might get health care. Are you mad that banks and grifters just keep piling up the dough While we lose our jobs, our health care, and our pensions? Do your cold hearts skip a beat to see the unhoused in the streets? No, you’re just mad ‘cause a sick kid might get health care. Well, you can call us socialists or libtards if you like, But we Grannies know the truth, and that’s for sure, When the people’s needs are met, then you can surely bet That we’ll all rejoice when sick kids get free health care.

title: THEY’VE GOT TO GO!
lyrics: Newly Revised Lyrics by Vicki Ryder (2025) CHORUS: Oh, don't ya know, They’ve got to go! Together we will stand; We’ll sing and shout And kick ’em out! No Kings in our land! They swore our Constitution they’d defend with all their might, But they’re deporting our good neighbors and we’re losing all our rights. And they torture and imprison while our treaties they ignore, And this can’t go on no more! REPEAT CHORUS They give tax cuts to the rich and say it’s good for you and me, But the deficit goes up while down goes our economy. And the layoffs keep on comin’ and it’s plain as it can be, No Kings, no tyranny! Oh, they say they’re waging wars to save the world from tyranny, But they’re lying through their teeth and killing our democracy. And the lies just keep on comin’ and it’s plain for all to see, No Kings, no tyranny! REPEAT CHORUS Folks are homeless in our cities and our health care is in doubt, While the billionaires get richer and that’s what it’s all about. So we’ve got to get together and we’ve got to rage and shout: No Kings, no tyranny! REPEAT CHORUS

title: D-E-M-O-C-R-A-C-Y 2025
lyrics: Newly Revised Lyrics for No Kings Day by Vicki Ryder (2025) Once old King George ruled us from England, With tarrifs and taxes on tea; But the people stood up and resisted And dumped his tea into the sea. Now there’s a new king in the White House, And he doesn’t care what we say; But we have some news for our president: Monarchy’s simply passé! CHORUS 1: When-ever tyrants reign And try to ignore their constituents, They’ll learn, by George, The power of our influence. They think they can stifle our freedoms, And think they’re above the law, But no matter how crooked or wealthy, They can’t shout “you’re fired” no more. We still have a tripartite system; Checks and balances still on the books; So we still have a say in what matters, And we’re tired of liars and crooks. CHORUS 2: We’ll resist with all our might! The power belongs to the people, we cry! We’ll spell it out for them now: D-E-M-O-C-R-A-C-Y! We still have the right to speak freely, And they can’t take that freedom from us; Our right to dissent we hold sacred, And we won’t be thrown under the bus. We’re gonna take back our power, ’Cause the First Amendment still stands. The power belongs to the people, And united in power we stand! REPEAT CHORUS 2
tune: My Bonnie Lies Over the Ocean

title: No Kings for June 14 2025
lyrics: He thinks it’s his right to be royal With absolute power to rule, Demanding to him we be loyal. That’s not what they taught us in school. Chorus No kings, no kings. Democracy calls for no kings, no kings. No kings, no kings. Democracy calls for no kings. He’s arrogant and hifalutin. It’s clear that he cares not for us. He glorifies tyrants like Putin, Throws allies right under the bus. He wants a parade in his honor With thousands of soldiers and tanks. Because this old man has no honor, Let’s stand up and tell him, “No thanks.” Oh, this is no time to be resting. His grifting is lasting too long. Come join us in peaceful protesting. With many together, we’re strong.

lyrics: BYE BYE FASCIST Pack your office Don’t pass Go You used DOGE Stooped so low Bye, bye, fascist Cutting pensions What a hoax Honest folks Going broke Bye, bye, fascist You can shove your oligarchy system Grannies (pause) are never going to give in No one wins A tariff war Quit before We END up poor Fascist, bye bye! Heil salutes On my TV You decree You DIDn’t mean Bye, bye, fascist You axed healthcare For the poor More and more Can’t afford Bye, bye, fascist Canada would never want to be you Sayonara... aloha and see you! They’ll (we'll) take their (our) Goods to EU While you woo Putin o-ooo Fascist, bye, bye

title: The Ballad of Ronald Rump
lyrics: The Ballad of Ronald Rump to the tune of the Ballad of Casey Jones Well Ronald wants all the immigrants out He’s got a plan to make this come about He tells us they are criminals of blackest heart He shoves them on a plane and tells it to depart There’s been no trial and if there were There would be no proof against him or her So the court says, Ronald, make them re-appear He says Screw you, court, I’m the decider here. Ronald Rump, strutting on the ramparts, Ronald Rump, with his scepter in his hand, Ronald Rump, living in a dreamworld, Wishes he were king over all the land. Well Ronald hates the government for all it does He fires all the leaders of the programs that we love He lets his cronies in to hold their sway They don’t know shit but they like the pay. Now Ronald gets a gift from the gummint of Qatar It’s a flying palace, it’s a shooting star, (spoken:) It’s actually an emolument, (sung:) but what the heck He’ll pay for it with a foreign policy check. Ronald Rump, strutting on the ramparts, Ronald Rump, with a flag unfurled, Ronald Rump, fantasizing freely Wishes he were emperor of all the world. Now all these actions Rump is carrying out They look so lordly, full of prance and shout They’re against the constitution, illegal as hell But Ronald doesn’t care, he can’t smell their smell. So let’s all tell him what the Congress won’t We love our country even if you don’t We’d rather have the law bending over us all Than a strong man forcing us to kneel and crawl. Ronald Rump, get back in your kennel, You need both a muzzle and a hood, We don’t want a wanna-be dictator But a citizen working for the common good.

title: Send Home the Marines
lyrics: Did you ever think you’d see the day, Did you think there’d come a time, When peaceful protest in the street Would be treated as a crime; When a nation claiming freedom And the right to think and speak, Would be brought down by a fascist coup That attacks the poor and weak? And they’re coming for the journalists And for all who dare speak out Against the bigots and the billionaires, And that’s why we rage and shout. Now their emperor who has no clothes Will be parading in DC. title: Donald Don't Know Much
lyrics:
Don't know much about democracy
Don't know much diplomacy
Don’t know much about leadership
Not a clue about statesmanship

But I do know that I’m the king
I’m the greatest king the world has seen
What a wonderful world just for me

Don't know much about honesty
Don't know much about modesty
Don't know much about the bribes I took
I have people who can cook the books

But I do love to scam and grift
and I’ll take a billion dollar gift
What a wonderful world just for me

Now I don't claim to care about people
No one counts but me
Because caring is only for suckers and losers
Winning is the life for me

Don't know much about human rights
Don't know much about civil rights
Don't know much about dignity
Don't know much about equality

But I do need to have control
and my tyranny is on a roll
What a wonderful world just for me

title: America the Beautiful 2026
lyrics:
Oh beautiful for spacious skies
for amber waves of grain
for purple mountain majesty
above the fruited plain
America, America,
your mountains are on fire
your air and waters are defiled
your future’s looking dire

Oh beautiful for grand ideals
of freedom, liberty
of equal justice under law
and true equality
But now we have a fascists state
Our values are in shreds
state terror and repression and
the rule of law is dead

Oh beautiful for leadership,
for aid to those in need,
diplomacy around the world –
that’s what we all believed
Instead we have imperial wars
with senseless death and gore,
unspeakable atrocities
from bombs that we paid for!

America, America,
We shed our tears for thee!
We’re going to take you back and claim
our land of liberty!

title: STOP THE RAIDS
lyrics: (Written in 2006 after a series of ICE raids targeted migrant laborers on Greyhound buses and AMTRAK trains) There’s a madness going ‘round Now that ICE has come to town; Grabbing folks right from their homes, Leaving children all alone. The Grannies now are hoppin’ mad, ‘Cause we’re losing all the freedoms that we thought we had. You fascists and your cruel raids Are makin’ ev’ryone afraid. Listen, ICE; we’re wise to you, And the cruel things you do! Your inhumanity’s well-known; Now leave our immigrants alone. Hear us, ICE; we’re on to you! And we know what we’re gonna do. We are free and unafraid And we’ll stop your racist raids. (Yes, we are free and unafraid And we’ll stop your racist raids.)

title: Kick Out the Clowns
lyrics: Note: the chords for this song are very difficult. We sing it a cappella (no accompaniment). Are-en’t they rich? Aren’t they a pair? Running the country aground With never a care? They’re much worse than clowns Isn’t it sad? Isn’t it mean? Risking democracy now To this machine? And these awful clowns? They’re truly obscene! Are-en’t they scary? Are-en’t they fools? Are-en’t they causing collapse And breaking the rules? Get rid of the clowns! Let’s kick out the clowns! Yes, kick out … the … clowns!

title: In Praise of Scientists
lyrics: Written for the Stand Up for Science rallies in March of 2025. Double slashes indicate a slight pause. We love you scientists, Oh yes we do-o, And we love researchers, hunting for clu-ues. You’re always in pursuit // of what’s true -- Oh, scientists, we love you! We love the botanist, the chemist to-oo, Microbiologists, to name a few-ew. Hey there geologists, what’s new?! Oh, scientists, we love you! We love astronomy, and physics to-oo, And entomology, it’s tru-ue Me-te-or-ol-o-gy, who knew?! Oh, scientists, we love you! We thank you scientists, oh yes we do-o, We cannot name you all, boo hoo-oo! We would be here all night, in this queue – Oh, scientists, we … love … you!!

title: We Didn't Vote for War
lyrics: We’re the Raging Grannies calling out from far and wide, Rising up together like a mighty ocean tide, To stop the wars and killing so we all can live and thrive, One human fam’ly strong. CHORUS: No more wars upon this planet! War’s a crime and it’s a racket! We’re calling on our Congress to stand up and do their job; We didn’t vote for war! Without consent of Congress, we’re now in another war While those of us who fund it with our taxes cry “No More!” We want our taxes spent to save the hungry and the poor, We didn’t vote for war! We don’t want our children to be taught to fight and harm, And we will work incessantly for nations to disarm. War has never been the answer, so we’re sounding the alarm: We didn’t vote for war! REPEAT CHORUS The hearts of women know that war’s a game that no one wins. We won’t be taken in by all their lies and all the spin. Now’s the time to come together and to rise as one and say: No more war, no way! REPEAT CHORUS OPTIONAL VERSE: Dropping bombs will not make peace, that’s plain stupidity; And it’s just as nuts as when you’re Fucking for Virginity. There is no other way to peace, Peace is the only way; We didn’t vote for war!

We need to start here and now and hope that it will spread far and wide across the world before we are all DEAD! So ban, ban, ban all war by stamping out its cause! lyrics: The water we are usin' now alrea-eady exceeds what our rainfall can replenish, and still our needs keep on growin' just like Donald Trump's evil deeds! lyrics: This song is about Donald, who thinks he is a king, but he just has delusions, a-mong other things. The reason he is now the president we've got is due to capital-is-m and its inherent rot! Cap'talism re-wards ruthless sociopaths! That's the reason Donald now has what he hath! People need to quit thinkin' Donald and his crew have an-ything in common with folks like me and you. There's just one thing where all billionaires don't have their share. That thing is empathy, and that's why they don't care how many other people must live in poverty so billionaires can still live in the lap of luxury! Now, Donald's entire crew and ev'ry rich donor have to be e-vic-ted. We must show them the door! That is why the road a-a-head will be tough. But putting it quite si-imply... ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!!!

title: ENOUGH!

On their shoulders we will say: NO KINGS ~ NO BILLIONAIRE DICTATORS ~ ENOUGH ~ YA BASTA !

Project Blue! Screw... screw... Project Blue! Screw... screw... Project Blue! Screw... screw... Project Blue! Now you can do anything but please SAVE us from Project Blue!

title: Doug Burgum's Theme Song
lyrics:
From the pristine Arctic wilderness
to the Gulf of Mexico
We will mine and drill, extract and frack
’ til no life on earth can grow

We will help the big oil billionaires
reap more profits every day
Though the costs outweigh the benefits,
make the little people pay

We will cut the regulations
that restrict BP and Shell
And the loggers, frackers, miners, all:
we will pave their way as well

So the Native People lose their land
and their lives if they protest
Native rights and human rights be damned
at the industry’s behest

Why let common people have the chance
to enjoy these public lands?
Let our wealthy buddies buy them up
so they’re all in private hands

Who needs hiking trails or fishing streams
scenic drives or deep dark skies?
We will fence these places, lock the gates,
post a sign saying “Privatized”

title: Keep Public Lands in Public Hands
lyrics:
Keep public lands, now,
in public hands, now
That’s our demand, now
Better understand, now
This land is your land
This land is my land
Keep public lands in public hands!

We do love nature, and we do love hiking
and river rafting, and mountain biking
We love to ramble through our scenic parklands
So, keep public lands in public hands!

From Valles Caldera to Carlsbad Caverns
From the Rio Grande to Chaco Canyon
From the Cibola Forest
to the sparkling White Sands
Keep public lands in public hands!

From the Gila Cliff homes to the pristine Pecos
From the Jemez River to the Sangre de Cristos
From the Zuni Mountains to the Bisti Badlands
Keep public lands in public hands!

Keep public lands, now,
in public hands, now
That’s our demand, now
Better understand, now
This land is your land
This land is my land
Keep public lands in public hands!

title: Take Your Bans Off My Body
lyrics:
Take your bans off my body
Leave my uterus alone
You have no right to say “yea” or “nay”
It’s my body and my final say!
And if I choose birth or abortion,
I’ll decide in my way
So keep out! - out! - out of my choice
You can have no say!

I don’t mess with your prostate,
I won’t try to castrate
I have respect for your privacy -
Li’l blue pills and your sex fantasies.
What if you could find yourself pregnant?
You would holler, “No way!”
So keep out! - out! - out of my choice!
You can have no say!
So keep out! - out! - out of my choice!
You can have no say!

title: The Sun is Burning in the Sky
lyrics:
<u>The Sun is Burning</u> by Ian Campbell



The sun is burning in the sky

Strands of clouds go slowly drifting by

In the park the dreamy bees

Are droning in the flowers, among the trees

And the sun burns in the sky



Now the sun is in the west

Little babes lay down to take their rest

And the couples in the park

Are holdin' hands and waitin' for the dark

And the sun is in the west



Now the sun is sinking low

Children playin' know it's time to go

High above a spot appears

A little blossom blooms and then draws near

And the sun is sinking low



Now the sun has come to Earth

Shrouded in a mushroom cloud of death

Death comes in a blinding flash

Of hellish heat and leaves a smear of ash

And the sun has come to Earth



Now the sun has disappeared

All that's left is darkness, pain, and fear

Twisted, sightless wrecks of men

Go crying on their knees and cry in pain

And the sun has disappeared
tune: The Sun is Burning in the Sky

title: Big Oil vs Life on Earth
lyrics: From the sand dunes down in south Iraq To the wild Alaskan seas, We have trashed the earth to pump the oil Just to fuel our SUV’s. We have overthrown democracies To exploit their oil reserves, Intervened in sovereign nation-states ‘Cause it’s Big Oil that we serve. Mega-profits go to Texaco, To BP and Exxon, too. Halliburton, Shell and Conoco, But the cost is paid by you. Many lives and many billions spent Just so profits can be made By extractive corporations: Yes, it’s blood for oil we trade. Yes, it’s blood for oil we trade. We must turn things 'round immediately. Exploitation has to cease. Build a green and clean economy, And it must be based on peace. We reject extractive industries. Let our planet start to heal! Give our kids a world that’s livable. We demand a GREEN NEW DEAL!

(very slow)->End the pro-fi-teering now and CO--VER-- EV'--RY---ONE! (one person)-> MED-I-CARE FOR ALL! The Grannies have left the building!

When we all act together we can do anything, do anything....... do anything! When we all act together we can do anything. There's nothing we can't overcome!

title: SAVE ROSHEL FROM GOIN' TO HELL!
lyrics: Don't even think about sendin' ICE bullet-proof, bomb-proof trucks! Innocent folks will pay the price in blood instead of bucks! With dead dads here and injured moms there and orphaned children ev'rywhere! Ev'ryone will know what you have done, so bein' you will really suck! JUST DON'T DO IT!!!

title: Carolina Stands Together Against ICE
lyrics: Lyrics: Paula Miller, Piedmont Raging Grannies Tune: Yankee Doodle 11/21/25 Carolina Stands Together Verse 1 Carolina folks unite We look out for each other, Neighbors marching day and night, Defending one another. Chorus Carolina stands as one, Voices getting louder— When we guard our neighbors’ rights, We all grow much prouder! Verse 2 Families facing sudden fear, Raids that come unbidden, But people gather far and ne-ar, And no one stays hidden. Chorus Carolina stands as one, Hands and hearts together— Brave enough to speak the truth In any kind of weather! Verse 3 Some officials try to make Rules that spread suspicion, Turning towns into a state Policed by new division. Chorus Carolina stands as one, Shining through the tension— Power used to sow distrust Meets its own dissension! Verse 4 Freedom isn’t kept by fear, It lives in how we treat folks; When you push too hard, it’s clear That heavy hands provoke folks. Chorus Carolina stands as one, People won’t be quiet— Justice grows when every day People rise and try it! Verse 5 So raise your voice and lend a hand, Hold the line together; What is built on care will sta-nd Longer than bad weather. Final Chorus Carolina stands as one, Hope is marching steady— When the people lead the way, Their power is always ready!

title: Tariffs, Tariffs, What Will be the Cost
lyrics: Tariffs, Tariffs, What Will be the Cost Tune: Turkey in the Straw Lyrics: Paula Miller 11/14/2025 (Verse 1) C With tariffs in the air now,and prices rising fast, G Im-port costs are climbing. Can this really last? C They’re slapping on the duties, and saying it’s for good, But we’re all feeling pressure like we G C knew we would. CHORUS C C7 Tariffs, oh tariffs, what is the cost? F Trade wars, high prices, are we all lost? C G7 This great big mess is Trump’s design, C G7 C So the easiiest solution is for him to resign. 1-2-3-4 1-2-G7 (Verse 2) C Our goods from overseas now are getting quite a fee, G From steel to soybeans, what will it do to me? C The markets are uncertain with every move they make, Trying to keep it steady, but how, for G C goodness sake! CHORUS C C7 Tariffs, oh tariffs, what is the cost? F Trade wars, high prices, are we all lost? C G7 This great big mess is Trump’s design, C G7 C So the easiest solution is for him to resign. 1-2-3-4 1-2-G7 (Verses 3 and 4) C I went to the market just the other day, G Lookin’ for some bargains in the usual way. C The cost of milk and bread all rose. I asked the grocer why. First he just scratched his head, and this G C was his reply: (go immediately to next verse) C “Well, the farmer’s paying more for the seed and the hay. G And the trucker’s got a fee just to haul it away C So by the time it’s sittin’ on the grocery shelf, G C You’re pay-ing double just to feed yourself.” CHORUS C C7 Tariffs, oh tariffs, what is the cost? F Trade wars, high prices, are we all lost? C G7 This great big mess is Trump’s design, C G7 C So the easiest solution is for him to resign. (slow down & repeat) C G7 C Yes, the easiest solution is for him to resign. F- C

title: A Cup of Chicken Noodle Soup
lyrics: A Can of Chicken Noodle Soup Tune:(Turkey in the Straw/Do Your Ears Hang Low?) Lyrics: Joanie Gould, Piedmont Raging Grannies Date: 11/13/25 Did you ever think the cost of food would get so high That the sticker shock in groceries would make you sigh Costs have risen by a third in just the past five years And the price of chicken noodle soup brings you to tears CHORUS 1 Food is a given, necessity, Food is a right, for you and for me, We can’t afford to pay our way When a can of chicken noodle soup is 2.59! (Count 2-3-4, 1-2) Did you ever think the government would be so mean As to cut SNAP benefits to kids already lean and To implement the tariffs that affect the price of food They no long-er care about the common good. (Count 2-3-4, 1-2) Something may be wrong with our society, When wages haven’t risen since 1983. Do you think perhaps that corporate greed may be to blame And our country hasn’t dealt with this in any way. CHORUS 3 Wages can’t keep up, Who gives a SHHHH (gesture with finger to lips) He-elp our hungry or let them eat cake It’s evident that something’s wrong When a can of chicken noodle soup is 2.59

title: Local Elections
lyrics: Local Elections Tune: Rock-a-Bye Baby Key: G, Starting note:E Lyrics: Emily and Paula Miller Piedmont Raging Grannies, October 1, 2025 Local elections may matter the most They get less attention but it’s vital to vote This little song may help you see why Your vote really matters in the great by and by. Affordable housing, drivable roads Community safety, and enforcing codes Funding firefighters, police, hospitals These things are managed by local officials. You’ve got city council, who make local rules And county commissioners set tax rates for you The mayor leads their meetings to keep folks in line All of these jobs make great cities shine. For each of these jobs your role’s most important You hire them by voting so use your good judgment If you want changes, downballot’s the place To get it all started please vote in each race. What we do locally goes to the top Vote all down the ballot, there’s no need to stop Show up for the midterms and all local races It influences policies in bigger places. Our country is built on the votes of each one The state legislatures must represent us We work from the bottom to climb the ladder The smaller elections do really matter!

title: The More We Share Our Stories
lyrics: “The More We Share Our Stories” (to the tune of “The More We Get Together”) Lyrics: Paula Miller, Piedmont Raging Grannies Revised November 21, 2025 C and G7 Verse 1 The more we share our stories, Our stories, our stories, The more we share our stories, The wiser we’ll be. Books help us remember And learn from each chapter— The more we share our stories, The wiser we’ll be. Verse 2 When books are being censored, And taken, and silenced, When books are being censored, We lose what we need. From Anne Frank’s life story To Huck Finn’s adventures, When books are being censored, We lose what we need. Verse 3 There’s room for every family, All families, all families, There’s room for every family— In stories, we’re free. For children who’re learning The ways that hearts journey, There’s room for every family— In stories, we’re free. Verse 4 My tastes may- not-be you’re tastes, And your tastes may-not-be my tastes, But choices shouldn’t be erased— There’s room for books to be. When we share ideas, Not hide them out of fear— My tastes may- not-be you’re tastes, But stories should stay free.
tune: The More We Get Together, the Happier We'll Be

title: A Place We All Belong
lyrics: This song was written in 2010. The last verse was added in December 2025. We SING today for dignity for EACH and everyone, WORKERS must have justice, no MATTER where they’re from, It TAKES us all to build a nation strong, A PLACE we all belong. IMmigrants deserve our thanks and THEY deserve good pay. They DO the jobs that no one wants and WORK hard night and day, It TAKES us all to build a nation strong, A PLACE we all belong. WORKERS must be left in peace to LIVE life unafraid, No HUMAN is illegal; STOP the racist raids! It TAKES us all to build a nation strong, A PLACE we all belong. And NOW when ICE invades our towns, we GRANnies take a stand And FACE these fascist terrorists together hand in hand. So WE can build a nation undiVIded, kind, and strong, A PLACE we all belong.

title: ICE Must Be Crushed!
lyrics: People snatched off of the street by ICE thugs wearin' masks and hoods, Squashin' rights to protest in our streets and neighborhoods, Wearin' signs that try to make them look like they're local police. The reason they are here is to make trouble, not keep peace! ICE must be crushed! It is ille-gal for them to be deployed a-gainst the people's will! If there's any such thing as il-le-gal aliens, it would be ICE a-gents! They're the ones who must be cleansed! If they look like an ICE a-gent, and they act like one as well, the chances are good that they sure as hell are not here for any reason serving our welfare or peace! So we demand that they're removed from all our nation's streets! ICE must be crushed! It is ille-gal for them to be deployed a-gainst the people's will! We demand Congress end this mess! with criminal dictator Donald Trump's ARREST! CRUSH ICE ! ARREST TRUMP!

title: Pass Medicare For All
lyrics: Healthcare is a human right Without it we may die Insurance is a dreadful fraud It makes the angels cry U.S. healthcare on the fritz And you may know why (CHORUS) Come on, Congress now We all need healthcare Everybody get together Pass Medicare For All right now Without her meds and treatment She will surely die Choose healthcare or food And kiss your ass goodbye No one should live this way Can’t you hear the people cry (CHORUS) If you’ve had a claim denied You will understand, listen Insurance is a useless grift One we cannot stand Healthcare and profit do not mix The people need a hand (CHORUS 3xs) Right now Right now

title: Joy To the World
lyrics:
Joy to the world! Let’s end all wars
Let earth have peace once more!
Let all the girls and boys
put down those warrior toys!
Let’s lift up our fellow man
For the rights of all we’ll stand
O the people want peace and joy,
and never war!

Peace to the world!
Bless every being!
And let the nations sing!
Of sisterhood and brotherhood
Of kindness, love and doing good
Let children play peacefully
In safety and harmony
And everywhere, everywhere
let freedom ring!

God bless the earth,
whose life we need
And let her live serene!
Let forests, fields and plains,
rocks, hills and flowing streams,
and every beautiful scene
be cherished and left clean
And bless, oh bless our planet green!

title: AULD LANG SYNE FOR FREEDOM
lyrics: Democracy is under siege by lawless kleptocratsThey’re waging war on we the people, our liberties attackedBut we unite, and we will fight!The fascists will not win!We won’t give up until we’ve takenour country back again!   We grieve for all the victims of Trump’s hateful policiesfor immigrants dehumanizedand for struggling refugeesFor those whose lives are torn apart,whom ICE has brutalizedFor those who suffer terror threatswhen they dare to criticize   We’ll join together and resist,Oh, we shall organize!We’ll push back on the propagandaand we’ll refute the liesWe’ll shelter neighbors targetedWe’ll stand for human rightsWe’ll protest and we’ll march and singand we’ll raise our voices high   Yes, we unite, and we will fight!The fascists will not win!We won’t give up until we’ve takenour country back again!

title: GREEN TREES
lyrics: What child is there who wants to grow  in toxic air and dis-ease?‘Cause all the children that I know     love li-iving things and green trees   Green trees are the lungs of earth and every child must know their worthGreen trees fill the air with life   and offer us hope and healing  Oh, forest trees, your gentle shadenow cools our warming planetyour roots hold fast the living earth and shelter its thriving inhabitantsGreen trees, oh pillars tall,     you plead in silence your poignant call:Save, save our forests all! from loggers’ axes unheeding    So may you grow, our guardians green   your gifts forever givingand may you sow your precious seeds, restoring the lands now grievingGreen trees, we cherish you   May humankind take care of youGreen trees, your life we need   Our lives depend on your keeping

title: NOEL
lyrics:
The first noel the angels did say
was to tell us,
“Remember that peace is the way.”
So, upon this Christmas Day,
let us vow to end war
Be a nation of peace
and we’ll fight no more!
Noel, noel – it means good news
Peace on the earth
is the news we must choose

It’s our taxes that support
funding wars round the world
It’s our own politicians
we have to implore
Stop the bombing, stop the drones,
stop the killing and pain
Stop the bloodshed and horror,
and financial drain
Noel, noel – it means good news
Peace on the earth
is the news we must choose

Christmas spirit is a thing
that your money can’t buy
For the spirit of Christmas
is peace, love and joy
Let our hearts be open wide,
let us welcome the birth
of the spirit of peace:
Let it will cover the earth!
Noel, noel – it means good news
Peace on the earth
is the news we must choose

title: IT’S BEGINNING TO LOOK A LOT LIKE FASCISM
lyrics:
It’s beginning to look a lot like fascism:
flailing king in charge
screaming TREASON! now EXECUTE
those who would speak the truth
His mind is small and truth is just too large

It’s beginning to look a lot like fascism:
Nazi goons galore
And the ugliest sight to see
is the savage cruelty
of the ICE thug force

There’s a warrior clown
who swaggers around7
telling troops to kill everyone
hankering for a wannabe war,
dropping bombs on boaters for fun:
theatrical performance for his audience of one

It’s beginning to look a lot like fascism
Kristi’s on a spree
making violent spectacles
exiling folks to hell
& ravaging the rule of law with glee

It’s beginning to look a lot like fascism
Join together now!
We must save our democracy!
We must fight the tyranny!
We will not bow down!
tune: It's Beginning to Look a Lot Like Christmas

title: WHAT WOULD JESUS DO IN PALESTINE?
lyrics:
What would Jesus do in Palestine?
He was born there, after all
What would he teach as we reach Christmastime,
with bombs continuing to fall?

Everybody knows that
Muslims are God’s children, too
We must make the planet right
Children of God –
Christian, Muslim and Jew
deserve to sleep in peace tonight

We pray that peace is on its way
We’ll stop the flow of weapons
from the USA!
And every mother’s child
is gonna live
And someday everyone
will come to forgive

And so,
we’re offering this simple prayer
to folks of every faith and view:
May you be blessed
with all kindness and care
and may peace be with you!

title: ICE! GET THE HELL OUT!!!
lyrics: We don't want ICE in our town or anywhere else a-round! decidin' who they will or won't take in by the color of a person's skin. With their hoods and masks and irritant gas We just want 'em to take their ass back to the deranged or-ange face who sent them in the first place! It's un-cons-ti-tu-tion-al for ICE to instill fear by kidnappin' innocent folks and then makin' 'em dis-appear! With no due process or transparency they think they are free to be judge and jury rolled into one! (pause) Well, WE'RE HERE TO TELL 'EM THEY'RE DONE!!! ICE! GET THE HELL OUTTA' TUCSON!!!

title: No Brainer
lyrics: We are Tucson Raging Grannies and we're here to kick some fannies Met-a-phor-ic-ly, that is........ If we're' go-ing to e-volve some-how we real-ly must re-solve to sim-ply tell it like it is ! Just be-cause your chest is wool-y you don't have the right to bull-y an-y-one that you may see......... And the fact you have a pe-nis does-n't' mean you are a gen-ius...... never mind your van-i-ty. What we-e-e would like to see-ee-ee is our de-mo-cra-cy-y-y look-ing out for each and ev-ry one...not just the rich... or those with guns! All the foi-bles in the sys-tem we are cap-a-ble of fix-in with our e-gos set a-side. And this stub-born pa-tri-arc-hy will be seen as pure ma-lar-key so it sim-ply won't a-bide. If our health care were pro-vi-ded and each night we could be guid-ed to a home that's safe and sound if all were fed and ed-u-cat-ed pov-er-ty would be a-ba-ted. THEN peace will a-bound! To be frank I can-not fath-om this for-ev-er- wide-ning cha-sm..... between the rich & poor. If' you're tired of all their tac-tics, bla-tant bill-ion-aire the-at-rics, then let's choose a diff'-rent door. We ha-a-ave abili-tie-ie-ies. To-ge-th-er we can be-e-e an-y-thing be-yond our wild-est drea-eams. That's what they fear, or so it seems! They al-ways flab-ber-gast us with the bills they ram right past us or do in the dark of night We are left dis-gus-ted, our pro-pos-als fill-a-bust-ed They make ev'-ry-thing a fight! We've got right-wing mach-in-a-tions hold-ing hos-tage our whole na-tion with their cheat-ing in plain sight. When all they've got is op-po-si-tion, stall-ing tac-tics, and re-sis-tance, You know that's not right! If you're feel-ing G O Pee-vish just re-call the life of Je-sus. You can rise a-bove the fray Though rules are not all gold-en, to this one we are be-hold-en. Live and let live is the way. If you-ou-ou're like mee-ee-ee, it's diff-i-cult to see-ee How we'll move a-hea-ea-ead..... These road-blocks stop us dead! If we con-tin-ue to be si-lent, it just makes us all com-pli-ant. THEN they'll get their way ! So WE must stand to-ge-ther fight-ing for a life that's bet-ter. (very slow)-> That's HOW WE'LL SAVE THE DAY......... AND THE PLANET!!!
tune: If I Only Had a Brain

title: I Want an Honest President for Christmas
lyrics: I want an honest president for Christmas Only an honest president will do Don’t want a stupid sod Or the world’s biggest fraud I want a truthful person the whole world can applaud. I could not stand a pedophile or rapist I would love someone who loves democracy They must have a giving heart It would be an awesome start If our president could be a SHE! BRIDGE: I can see myself on Christmas morning Running down the stairs I see the Christmas tree With presents just for me And one of them is President A-O-C! I want an honest president for Christmas And in my heart I know that you do, too (sing next 2 lines slowly, then normal tempo for last line) If we ever could replace ” ORANGE MAN”, our big disgrace I’ll be thanking Santa Claus!
tune: I Want a Hippopotamus for Christmas

title: I've Grown Accustomed
lyrics:
Preface: Inspired by a quote from Jason Stanley
“The targeting of non-citizens is only really a way to normalize the targeting of everybody.” Nov 15, 2025, on the Velshi show,  MSNBC.

1. I’ve grown accustomed to disgrace
The daily horrors that I see
I’ve grown accustomed to the news
Scrubbed clean of the abuse
The loss
Of con-stitu-tional rights
Just seems like rehash to me now
How can I really take it in
I was a protest regular at every action and event
Now I just shout loudly at the TV
when I vent
I’ve grown accustomed to the grift
The incoherent tweets
Accustomed to disgrace

2. I’m just so numb to all the hate
The MAGA hats and Nazi signs
Erasing history from our lives
The immigrants and tribes
Our kids
Not taught
The battles we fought
Anyone who isn’t lily-white
Who love and worship differently
The xenophobic racist orders
And the quackery fake cures
Harassing and investigating
anyone who cares to stand up to the felon POTUS
And stand for all our allies
Accustomed to the hate

3. I’ve grown accustomed to the fear
The outright banning of the truth
Those that speak up are cancelled out
So we must sing and shout
We risk
Arrest
But-can-we-rest?
So many have just disappeared
Trump has now stoked our greatest fear
I dread some MAGA “patriot” will likely recognize my face
But if I leave, who else will brave the storm… and take my place…
I’ve grown accustomed to the threats
McCarthy era trials
Accustomed to the fear

title: Fair Trade Dreidel
lyrics: PRONUNCIATION NOTE: "Tchotchkes" (2nd stanza) = "chotch-keys". Song should be lively and bouncy!
